title: ABB AC500 - New CPU PM595 - Connecting performance for productivity
description: The new AC500 PM595 Machinery Controller is optimized for robust, high performance industrial control in a well-designed and awarded housing (iF design Award 2015). The very high level of computational capability allows the new controller to handle extremely complex control tasks, involving complexities such as precision coordinated motion with very large quantities of axes, and mathematics-intensive computation such as real-time trigonometric calculations for robotics or other advanced kinematic applications. The controller also has a built-in interface to allow ABB's advanced safety PLC to be connected for high risk applications. Versatile connectivity is central to the new PM595 controller's design. This allows it to be used with both legacy systems and today's favored networks - as well as providing a soft architecture that can handle future demands.

title: Wind Retrofit services - a new lease of life for aging wind turbines
description:
As the wind energy market has matured, assets are aging, reducing the efficiency of the turbines. Many of these turbines have passed the end of their warranty period but attention is still required to maintain an aging fleet. 

This video covers the benefits of a solution to maintaining these aged fleets – refurbishment and retrofit of different types of turbines by installing a full power converter. Wind retrofitting enables wind turbines to work at variable speeds by controlling the system torque and allowing the maximum power transfer between the wind and turbine blades. This retrofit process will return a significant increase in productivity in terms of efficiency as it takes advantage of low winds. In addition, this process will result in improved quality of power and reliability, and a reduction in mechanical stress resulting in an extended lifetime of the turbine. 
This process can serve existing installed base or used turbines being dismantled and sold for community use in second-hand market. 

For more information, please visit http://new.abb.com/power-converters-inverters/wind-turbines/service/advanced-services

title: Papiermaschine "PM9" / Papermachine "PM9" / "PM9"型造纸机 / Machine à papier "PM9"
description:
ZU VERKAUFEN / FOR SALE / 出售造纸机 / À VENDRE

Auf der modernen Produktionslinie 9, Bj. 1991 wurden  240'000 Jahrestonnen gestrichenes Feinpapier (100-300 g/m²) mit bis zu 1000 m/min. hergestellt. Die Arbeitsbreite am Rollenschneider beträgt 5,4 m (eventuell sind bis 5,6 m möglich) Die Anlagen eignen sich auch für die Herstellung von Liner und Faltschachtelkarton. Die Linie verfügt über eine autom. Zellstoffentdrahtung, Pulperanlagen, Refineranlagen, Papiermaschine, Umroller, offline 4 Coater Streichmaschine mit online Softkalander, zwei Superkalander, einem Rollenschneider und einer Rollenverpackungsanlage.

Paper machine 9, is a modern, high-performance production system in mint condition. Built in 1991, the production line manufactured 240,000 annual tonnes of coated paper (100-300 g/m²) up until mid-2011. The machinery reached a production speed of 1,000 m/min. maximum at a winder working width of 5.4 m. Depending on the coating process, widths of up to 5.6 m are also possible. The line includes automatic pulp bale dewiring machinery, refining equipment, a paper machine, rewinder, four offline coaters with an soft calender online, two supercalenders, a winder and a paper roll packaging machine.

"PM9"型造纸机是一款现代化的生产线。它制造于1991年，直到2011年中期停止生产为止，每年生产240000吨单位重量为每平方米100-300 克的涂布文化纸。该设备车速最高可达每分钟1000米，卷筒纸分切机的纸幅宽度为5.4米（最宽可达5.6米）。该设备也可以用于生产纸板外壁和瓦楞纸板箱。本生产线包括自动去铁丝机、纸纤维处理设备、盘磨设备、造纸机、重卷机、四台外置的涂布机（内设软辊压光机）、两台超级压光机、一台卷筒纸分切和一套卷纸包装设备。

Sur la ligne de production 9 ("PM9"), construite en 1991, 240'000 tonnes de papier couché de qualité (100-300 g/m²) étaient produits annuellement à une vitesse de pointe de 1000 m/min. La largeur de travail sur la refendeuse est de 5,4 m (jusqu'à 5,6 m sont possibles). Les installations se prêtent également à la fabrication de doublures et de cartons plats. La ligne de production dispose d'un dispositif d'enlèvement de fil de la pâte, de pulpeurs, de raffineurs, d'une machine à papier, de bobineuses, d'une coucheuse hors-ligne 4 Coater avec une calandre douce en ligne, de deux supercalandres, d'une refendeuse et d'une emballeuse.



www.papiermaschinen-biberist.ch

title: Papiermaschine "PM8" / Papermachine "PM8" / "PM8"型造纸机 / Machine à papier "PM8"
description:
ZU VERKAUFEN / FOR SALE / 出售造纸机 / À VENDRE

Bei der Produktionslinie 8 handelt es sich um eine leistungsfähige Anlage aus dem Bj. 1972 zur Herstellung von 140'000 t gestrichenem Feinpapier (70-115 g/m²). Sie produziert bis Mitte 2011 mit bis zu 950 m/min. mit einer beschnitten Rollerbreite von 5,1 m und gehörte dank ständiger Modernisierungen zu den effizientesten Anlagen in Europa.  Die Anlage überzeugt durch ihren einfachen Aufbau. Sie umfasst automatische  Zellstoffentdrahtung, Zellstoffaufbereitungsanlagen, Refineranlagen, Papiermaschine, Umroller, offline 2  Coater Streichmaschine, zwei Superkalander sowie einem Rollenschneider.

Paper machine 8 is a high-performance line built in 1972 for the production of 140,000 tonnes of coated fine paper (70-115 g/m²). Up until mid-2011 it manufactured up to 950 m/min. with a cut roll width of 5.1 m. Thanks to ongoing renovations, it was one of the most efficient lines in Europe. Its simple construction is one of the most impressive features of this production line, which includes an automatic pulp bale dewiring machinery, pulp treatment equipment, refining equipment, a paper machine, rewinder, two offline coaters, two supercalenders and a winder.

"PM 8"型造纸机是一款制造于1972年的功能强大的设备，每年可生产140000吨单位重量为每平方米70-115克的涂布文化纸。截至到2011年中期停止生产为止，该设备的车速可达到每分钟950米，成纸宽度为5.1 米。因为一直对该机进行更新优化，所以该套设备是欧洲功能最强大的生产线之一。该机以结构简单著称，它包括自动去铁丝机、纸纤维处理设备、盘磨设备、造纸机、重卷机、两台外置的涂布机、两台超级压光机和一台卷筒纸分切机。

La ligne de production 8 ("PM8") est une installation puissante datant de 1972 pour la fabrication de 140'000 t de papier couché de qualité (70-115 g/m²). Jusqu'à mi-2011, elle opérait à une vitesse allant jusqu'à 950 m/min avec une largeur de bobine de 5,1 m (fini). Grâce à une constante modernisation, elle faisait partie des installations les plus efficaces d'Europe. La machine séduit par la simplicité de sa construction. Elle comprend un dispositif d'enlèvement de fil de la pâte, les systèmes de préparation de pâte, les raffineurs, la machine à papier, les bobineuses, une coucheuse hors-ligne 2 Coater, deux supercalandres et une refendeuse.

title: About the Lenovo - CCE deal
description:
Joseph D. Gallagher, Co-Head of Mergers and Acquisitions, Asia Pacific shares his insights on the Lenovo - CCE Deal.

About the partnership between Credit Suisse and Lenovo: 

Lenovo has been providing NASAs astronauts with their computers since 1995. But despite cornering the market in space, ThinkPads were hard to come by in Brazil. Lenovo's desire to have a presence in Brazil is understandable. It's already the world's third fastest growing economy. And with the forthcoming World Cup and 2016 Olympics both taking place in this vibrant country, the economy can only continue to grow.

But with taxes on imported electronics as high as 43% compared to 2.75% on locally produced products, Lenovo wasn't in any position to get a foothold in Brazil. Credit Suisse's solution was radical, but rational. We facilitated Lenovo's acquisition of CCE, Brazil's largest domestic electronics manufacturer.

The deal, completed in September 2012, has benefitted Lenovo, CCE's shareholders and the Brazilian economy. Lenovo has invested $130 million in R&D in Brazil, at the same time that it has gained access to one of the world's fastest growing PC markets.

Even for the company that provides NASA's computers, that's one giant leap.

title: Introduction to ABB Drives Customer Laboratory
description: Located beside ABB’s Helsinki drives factory, the ABB drives test laboratory is intended primarily for external customers. The laboratory provides high-precision measurements of drive/motor dynamic performance, loadability and efficiency that enable customers to find an optimal drive system for their application and thus reduce costs, equipment size and energy consumption. The measurements are obtained using an extremely precise device. In addition, the laboratory makes it possible to verify motor control performance and match customer motors with ABB drives so that customers have an opportunity to rapidly and accurately verify ABB as a new supplier.

title: ACS310 – Configuration of multipump and fan control with soft start
description: This video shows how to configure parameters for multipump and fan control with a soft start for ABB general purpose drive, ACS310 after installation. In the multipump functionality, one pump is pressure controlled and auxiliary pumps are on/off controlled, based on capacity needs. It eliminates the need for an external programmable logic controller, reduces the motor stress and increases life time. The soft start lowers the pressure peaks on the pipelines and pumps. The new autochange functionality equalizes duty time between the pump motors, when auxiliary motors are not running.

title: About the Lenovo - NEC Deal
description:
Joseph D. Gallagher, Co-Head of Mergers and Acquisitions, Asia Pacific gives us the background on the Lenovo - NEC transaction.

About the partnership between Credit Suisse and NEC:

Ever since its launch as the Nippon Electric Company in July 1899, NEC has been at the forefront of the developing world of technology. From its advances in the way switchboards could be used for long distance calls in 1919, to Japan's first domestically produced automatic phone exchange in 1927, many of NEC's early innovations were in the field of telecommunications. Then in 1954, the company began its first forays into the emerging world of computers.

And 20 or so years later, NEC's president made the bold prediction that one day, computers and communications would be integrated. A statement that proved to be as accurate as it was ahead of its time.

Today, the name NEC remains synonymous with innovation and advances in technology, and Credit Suisse is helping keep them at the forefront, by helping shape their corporate strategy and, most recently, orchestrating the merger that makes NEC and Lenovo the fourth largest computer manufacturer in the world.

title: AirAsia - The Rock 'n' Roll Story
description:
Watch AirAsia's Tony Fernandes and Helman Sitohang from Credit Suisse discuss how Asia's largest low cost carrier was created.

About the partnership between Credit Suisse and AirAsia:

2001 was a tough time to be in the airline industry. Yet Tony Fernandes had just risked everything to relaunch an airline he'd bought for less than a dollar. As he slept in his office at Kuala Lumpur airport, with dreams of relaunching AirAsia as a budget airline, many questioned his timing, as much as his judgment.

Every other airline in the world was scaling back and cutting overheads, and AirAsia was cutting fares. None of the international banks were prepared to help him. Except one. 

Credit Suisse's involvement with AirAsia began in 2002, with the $30 million private placement that would propel AirAsia not just into profit, but into expansion, with more aeroplanes, new routes and a second hub at Senai International Airport.

description:
For more information, visit http://www.abb.com/ACS580
Two ramp sets allows the speed changes of the drive be changed on the fly based on digital input, fieldbus control or when exceeding certain predefined speed. This function is often required with certain types of mechanics such as pumps where the initial ramp (when starting) and final ramp (when changing speed above defined speed) are different or when different ramp times are needed when changing speed for instance if connected equipment is driven in two different operating conditions.

title: Reliable permanent magnet motor control for General Magnetic

title: Geberit Social Project 2014
description:
„Schon auf der Anreise blieb uns der Atem weg“, berichten unsere Lernenden. Während des Sozialprojekts in Indien erlebten sie hautnah mit, was Armut bedeutet. Und sie lachen noch heute über den chaotischen Verkehr durch Varanasi, wo es keine erkennbare Regel gibt und des Öfteren mal eine Kuh im Weg steht. Die WC-Anlagen in der Schule für körperlich behinderte Kinder glänzen inzwischen wieder wie neu und die jungen Abenteurer sind zurück in ihrer Heimat. Gönnt auch ihr euch einen Rückblick auf ihre Erlebnisse!

“We were taken aback before we had even set foot in the village,” explain our apprentices. During the social project in India, they experienced at first hand what poverty means. And they still laugh today about the chaotic traffic in Varanasi, where there are no discernible rules and getting stuck behind a cow is an everyday hazard. With the toilet facilities in the school for differently abled children now back in mint condition, the young adventurers are home once again. Fancy taking a look back at their experiences?

Impressions of this year's social project from the KIRAN village in Varanasi (India)

Movie: Simon Straetker Productions (https://www.facebook.com/straetkersimon?fref=ts)

title: How to install MASTERLINE Ultimate cable system
description:

The robust connector head with an integrated pulling eye allow for easy cable lifting without the need for hoisting grips. The encapsulated connector head can be directly attached to the mast with a single «click» at a pre-mounted adaptor plate. See how fast it works.

Electric motors play a very important role in our everyday businesses and lives. They move and run basically everything we need for business or pleasure. All these motors use electricity. Controlling the way motors use electricity not only helps you save energy, but also reduce scrap and maintenance costs. This motor control comes in technology we call AC drives (also known as variable speed drives (VSD) or variable frequency drives (VFD). But how do variable speed drives work? This video provides a not-too-technical explanation.

title: The ACS800-38 low harmonic drive for outdoor use
description:
For more information please visit http://new.abb.com/drives
The ACS800-38 low harmonic drive for outdoor use boosts productivity without compromise in the harshest of environments. This drive is suitable for dusty, windy and humid environments in the oil and mining sector. The drive can be used to control industry application such as ESP, PCP and booster pumps, conveyors, feeders, compressors and crushers.
The ACS800-38 offers our low harmonic drive modules an innovative self-contained cooling system. The drive is easy to transport and connect to the power supply and motor. Additional features includes enclosure class IP55 as standard and IP56 / NEMA 4 as option.

title: Combined Leak Testing and Locating with Sensistor ILS500 Leak Detection System
description:
Purpose: Integral accept/reject test and leak locating during same cycle.
Test steps: Placing object in test chamber - evacuating air inside object -- gross leak test- blockage test - injecting tracer gas into object -- accumulation (waiting) time - sampling air from fixture- analyzing H2 content - decision (accept/reject) - opening lid and locating leak manually - tracer gas evacuation - disconnecting object.
Instruments: Sensistor ILS500 Leak Detection System, AP29ECO Sampling Probe.
Typical range: 0.1- 5 cc/min. Leak locating will detect leaks down to 3x10- 7 mbarl/s.

title: Find Leaks in Confined Spaces with Sensistor ISH2000 Hydrogen Leak Detector
description:

Test steps: Test object filled with tracer gas - manual leak detection with hand probe in passive mode - start counter flow of fresh air in front of sensor - pin-point leak in confined space saturated with tracer gas.
Instruments: Sensistor ISH2000 Hydrogen Leak Detector, AP57 Counter Flow Probe .

title: Kantonalbank TV-Spot «Fotograf»
description:
Markenclaim der Kantonalbanken: «Gemeinsam wachsen.» heisst gemeinsam Erfolg haben und so steht die aktuelle Imagekampagne unter dem Motto «Erfolg».

Ihr Leben. Ihre Bank. Unser Graubünden. Die Graubündner Kantonalbank -- die Partnerin für Finanzierungen, Anlagen, Vermögensverwaltung und Ihre Vorsorge. 

«Gemeinsam wachsen.» heisst gemeinsam Erfolg haben.
Die Kampagne basiert auf den Kernwerten Kundennähe, Kontinuität und Kompetenz und nimmt den Gedanken auf, dass Erfolg für jede und jeden etwas anderes bedeutet. Weil dies so ist, ist die beste Anlageberatung auch die ganz persönliche. Die regional stark verwurzelten Kantonalbanken kennen und respektieren ihre Kundschaft besonders gut. Und diese lokale und emotionale Nähe wird von den Kundinnen und Kunden sehr geschätzt. Sie bleiben ihrer Kantonalbank treu, oft von der Kindheit bis ins hohe Alter. Weil die Kantonalbanken ihre Kundinnen und Kunden kennen und verstehen, können sie auf deren wechselnde Bedürfnisse eingehen und sie langfristig erfolgreich beraten. Sie können mit ihnen beispielsweise eine Anlagestrategie herausarbeiten, die genau zu ihnen passt -- zu ihrem Alter, ihrem Risikoprofil, ihren Lebensumständen, ihrem Einkommen und ihrem Vermögen. Die Kantonalbanken positionieren sich als Bank mit Beraterinnen und Beratern, deren Kenntnisse und Fähigkeiten weit mehr umfassen als das Wissen über Wirtschaft, Geld und Bankwesen: Als Expertinnen und Experten, die nahe bei den Menschen sind. Weil Sie ihre Kundinnen und Kunden besser kennen, arbeiten sie erfolgreich für sie und können deshalb mit ihnen «Gemeinsam wachsen.».

TV-Spots, die Kundennähe, Kontinuität und insbesondere Anlagekompetenz vermitteln, authentische Geschichten, die bekannte Filmmusik und überzeugende und reale Protagonisten: Das sind die Ingredienzien der aktuellen Kantonalbank-Imagewerbung. Die Filme bestehen aus in sich geschlossenen Kurzsequenzen, in denen unterschiedliche Menschen ein Statement abgeben, was Erfolg für sie ganz persönlich bedeutet. Zum Abschluss kommentiert eine Mitarbeiterin oder ein Mitarbeiter der Kantonalbank: «Für uns von der Kantonalbank ist Erfolg ein zufriedener Kunde. Und weil Erfolg für jeden Kunden etwas anderes ist, ist die beste Anlageberatung die ganz persönliche».

http://www.gkb.ch

title: Zehnder Clean Air Solutions: Een klantenoordeel - ES3 Third party logistics
description:
ES3 is een ervaren en zeer deskundige logistieke dienstverlener die producenten van verpakte consumentengoederen bedient. Stof is onaanvaardbaar voor ES3, haar klanten, leveranciers, werknemers en de auditors, die toezicht houden op de naleving van de normen. De beheersing van de stofbelasting was voor ES3 een groot operationeel probleem en een hoge kostenpost. ES3 had een oplossing nodig die de stofbelasting zou terugdringen naar een gezonder niveau voor het personeel en die het gebouw veilig en schoon voor levensmiddelen en gereed voor inspecties zou houden.
Voor meer informatie bezoek onze website http://www.zehnder.nl/producten-en-systemen/clean-air-solutions/logistiek

title: Zehnder Clean Air Solutions: Een klantenoordeel - Clean Air for Industry - Wila
description:
WILA is de grootste onafhankelijke producent van kant- en buigperstools ter wereld. De reputatie van het bedrijf is gebaseerd op vakmanschap, klantgerichtheid en een passie voor buigtechnologie. Productie gebeurt met een computergestuurde CNS frees. Dit proces vereist het gebruik van een koelmiddel, wat krachtige dampen veroorzaakt en een negatief effect heeft op de luchtkwaliteit in de fabriek. Dit veroorzaakt niet alleen ademhalingsproblemen bij de medewerkers, maar taste ook de machines aan. Wila zocht een oplossing voor hun probleem.
Voor meer informatie bezoek onze website http://www.zehnder.nl/producten-en-systemen/clean-air-solutions

title: Zehnder Clean Air Solutions: Un air propre pour l’industrie - WILA, Lochem (Pays-Bas)
description:
Wila est le premier fabricant mondial indépendant d’outils pour presses plieuses. Il a fondé sa réputation sur son savoir-faire, son écoute du client et sa passion pour la technologie des presses plieuses.La production s’effectue sur des machines d’usinage CNC. Pendant le processus, nous utilisons un liquide de refroidissement qui émet de la vapeur dans l’air et avait une odeur désagréable. La vapeur avait également de troubles respiratoires et un impact négatif sur les machines : elle affectait leur rendement. 
 
Pour plus d'informations, se il vous plaît visitez: http://www.zehnder.fr/produits-et-systemes/systemes-de-purification-de-air

title: Peter Thiel - Developing the Developed World
description:
When tracked against the lofty hopes of the 1950s and 1960s, technological progress has fallen short in many domains. This technology stagnation threatens not just our financial markets, but the entire modern political order, which is predicated on easy and relentless growth. For the world to thrive in the decades ahead, we must find ways to accelerate the rate of innovation and create a new generation of breakthrough technology companies.

description:
Cementa AB deel uit van de internationale HeidelbergCement Group, opgericht in 1871, is één van Zwedens grootste producenten van bouwmaterialen. Tegenwoordig maakt dit moderne, hoogtechnologisch bedrijf en produceert en verkoopt het cement aan bouwbedrijven in Zweden en de rest van de wereld. Bij het vermalen van verschillende materialen komt veel stof vrij wat resulteert in een slechte omgeving voor de werknemers en de machines. Cementa zocht een oplossing voor hun probleem.

description:
Founded in 1871, Cementa is one of Sweden's largest manufacturers of construction materials. Today Cementa, part of the international HeidelbergCement Group, is a modern, high-technology business that manufactures and sells cement to the construction industry in Sweden and around the world.
The process of crushing various materials creates a considerable amount of dust which caused a bad environment for the employees and the machines inside the building. Cementa searched for a solution to solve their problem. 
For further information please visit our website: http://www.zehnder-systems.com/

description:
WILA is the worlds largest independent manufacturer of press brake tools, its reputation is based on a craftsmanship, customer focus and a passion for press brake technology. Production is carried out on CNC milling machines, this process requires to use a coolant which causes visible vapour and an unpleasant odour in the air. This not only caused breathing problemes for the employees but also effected machines and those productivity. Wila searched for a solution to solve their problem. 
For further information please visit our website: http://www.zehnder-systems.com/

title: 100 Jahre MCH Group. Eine Geschichte mit Emotionen.
description:
Das Jahr 2016 ist für die MCH Group und ihre Gesellschaften ein besonderes: Wir feiern nicht nur die 100. Muba, sondern gleichzeitig den 100. Geburtstag unserer Unternehmensgruppe sowie das Gründungsjahr des modernen Messewesens in der Schweiz. Das dreifache Jubiläum steht unter dem Motto «100 Jahre Zukunft», was den Pioniergeist und die Innovationskraft der MCH Group seit ihrer Gründung als Schweizer Mustermesse vor 100 Jahren versinnbildlicht. Wir nehmen das Jubiläum nicht nur zum Anlass, auf unsere spannende Vergangenheit zurückzublicken, sondern wollen auch vorausschauen, um weiterhin Geschichte zu schreiben. Begleiten Sie uns dabei!

Erfolgreiche Events sind perfekt geschriebene Geschichten… Geschichten mit authentischen Informationen, ergreifenden Emotionen und realen Begegnungen. Die Menschen haben immer mehr das Bedürfnis nach lebendigen und in Erinnerung bleibenden Erlebnissen. Heute werden diese Live-Events oft mit multimedialen Effekten angereichert, und die reale mit der digitalen Welt verknüpft. 
Das Spektrum unserer Events ist breit, es reicht von Messen und anderen Firmenevents wie Kundenanlässen, Generalversammlungen oder Jubiläen über kulturelle und sportliche Veranstaltungen bis hin zu Landes- oder Weltausstellungen. Wir – die Event Services Gesellschaften der MCH Group – bieten unseren Kunden ein breites Spektrum an Dienstleistungen für Veranstaltungen aller Art. Wir beraten, wir konzipieren, wir planen. Wir managen und organisieren. Wir sind die Regisseure, unsere Kunden sind die Stars. Unsere Event Services Firmen Reflection Marketing, Rufener, Expomobilia und Winkler realisieren jedes Jahr weit über 1'000 Projekte… und das rund um die Welt. Erstklassig, kreativ und individuell…. Für einzigartige Geschichten, die auch in 100 Jahren noch Emotionen wecken.
Jenny Somm, Managing Director Rufener Events

Die MCH Group ist eine führende internationale Live-Marketing-Unternehmensgruppe. Sie bietet ihren Kunden ein einzigartiges Dienstleistungs-Netzwerk im gesamten Messe- und Event-Markt.
---
Swiss Exhibition is one of the leading live marketing companies in Europe. The Swiss Exhibition Group has been founded in 2001 by the merger of the former exhibition companies in Basel and Zurich.

title: The Bell that Rang in Easter – Official App Trailer
description:
A new heart-warming Easter story the whole family will enjoy, brought to you by the Lindt Gold Bunny. Download it FREE now on the App Store, Google Play or http://lindt.me/bsc8K.
How far would you go for a friend?
 
Theo is a tiny bunny with a big heart, and he’s determined to find his one true friend, a little girl named Emma, the perfect present for Easter. With a TAP, TILT and SWIPE, help Theo along this remarkable interactive adventure for the Easter season.
 
From a bunny no one noticed, comes a story you’ll never forget, brought to life with gorgeous illustrations, animation and a cinematic soundtrack. 
 
Lindt Gold Bunny presents The Bell That Rang In Easter.
 
Download it FREE now on the App Store, Google Play or http://lindt.me/bsc8K.
 
Features:
 
• An original story for the Easter season the whole family will love
• Beautiful illustrations and animation on every page
• Read it yourself or read along with the charming narrator
• Tap, drag, and swipe objects to bring the story to life
• Move, tilt and shake your device to interact with the storybook world
• Can you find all of the hidden Lindor Eggs?
• No in-app purchases
• No third-party ads

title: Zehnder heating and cooling ceiling system: Functional principle heating
description: The same method of heating buildings cheaply and efficiently can also be used to cool them. Cold water flows through the cooling ceiling. Because people and objects in the room have a higher temperature, they radiate their heat to the ceiling. At the same time, warm air inside the room also rises and gives off its heat to the cooling ceiling. The cooled air flows back down into the room. Further information on http://www.international.zehnder-systems.com/products-and-systems/heating-and-cooling-ceiling-systems

title: NEC and Credit Suisse - About the Relationship
description:
Watch how Credit Suisse helped bring about the happy and prosperous union of two of the world's computer giants.

About the partnership between Credit Suisse and NEC:

Ever since its launch as the Nippon Electric Company in July 1899, NEC has been at the forefront of the developing world of technology. From its advances in the way switchboards could be used for long distance calls in 1919, to Japan's first domestically produced automatic phone exchange in 1927, many of NEC's early innovations were in the field of telecommunications. Then in 1954, the company began its first forays into the emerging world of computers.

And 20 or so years later, NEC's president made the bold prediction that one day, computers and communications would be integrated. A statement that proved to be as accurate as it was ahead of its time.

Today, the name NEC remains synonymous with innovation and advances in technology, and Credit Suisse is helping keep them at the forefront, by helping shape their corporate strategy and, most recently, orchestrating the merger that makes NEC and Lenovo the fourth largest computer manufacturer in the world.

About our campaign: 

For over a century and a half, our clients have been the focus of everything Credit Suisse does. And now, these clients are the focus of a new advertising campaign. Credit Suisse has enlisted the help of top photographers, artists and illustrators to create a campaign that celebrates its clients' ambitions. 

On our website, you can see examples of the campaign and of Credit Suisse's commitment to its clients in the fields of fashion, life assurance, wine making, transport and travel, as well as confectionery, communications and environmental engineering. 

Have a look at how our advertising brings these clients' ambitions to life: http://www.credit-suisse.com/clients

title: Tumi - Jerome Griffith's Journey With Credit Suisse
description:
Watch Tumi CEO Jerome Griffith explain the importance of his relationship with Credit Suisse and how the bank has aided Tumi globally. 

About the partnership between Credit Suisse and Tumi:

In many respects, Tumi, the premium business, lifestyle, and travel accessories company is a perfect case study for Credit Suisse. From the company's outset in 1975, Tumi's vision was to produce high quality travel goods for the discerning globe trotter. Tumi pioneered the use of ballistic nylon fabric, to make their travel bags and cases virtually abrasion proof. 

Tumi pioneered innovations in wheeled luggage, laptop protection, and brought their uncompromising attitude into every aspect of their designs. 

To this day, Tumi holds more than 180 patents for its design and engineering breakthroughs.
Under its new CEO, Tumi's ambitions are growing, and Jerome Griffith wants to take the brand further than simply being a world class manufacturer of luggage and business cases.

His aim is to turn Tumi into a lifestyle brand. And he looked to Credit Suisse to help him.
One successful IPO later, Tumi's future is looking as good as one of its new leather iPad cases, and the company is ready for the next stage of its journey. 

About our campaign: 

For over a century and a half, our clients have been the focus of everything Credit Suisse does. And now, these clients are the focus of a new advertising campaign. title: ABB - Energy efficiency. A solution.
description: Intelligent motor control methods -- variable speed drives -- can help in solving the energy challenges we all face. Variable speed drives regulate the speed of a motor and can reduce energy consumption by as much as 30% to 50% in many applications and in extreme cases by as much as by 90%. Pumps are one of the most common motor applications and offer the biggest potential for saving energy because at half the speed only one-eighth of the power is needed.

title: ABB motion control products - Overwrapper
description: This example shows how the overwrapping process can be synchronized to a batch of products (bottles) on a conveyor. The fast latch functionality is used to capture the position of the bottles by reading a value from an encoder attached to the conveyor. This fast latch is triggered when the bottles pass a registration sensor. From this measured position we can set a position trigger value at which point our axes will start moving to wrap the batch of bottles. The move types used to achieve this are known as 'flying shears'. Once the bottles are wrapped they will move past another sensor which will turn the heater on and shrink the wrap around the bottles.

http://declics.romande-energie.ch/
http://www.romande-energie.ch/
La série «Ça, c'est fait !» illustre de manière originale et drôle l'impact des gestes simples du quotidien permettant d'économiser l'énergie. Céline et Fabien ont appris les bons gestes, mais ça n'a pas toujours été facile !
Avec Aurélie Candaux et Julien Opoix.

title: ABB motion control products - Vertical Form Fill Seal
description: This example shows a Form, Fill and Seal machine where the material continues to run while sealing is in progress. It consists of 2 main axes and an encoder mounted to make contact with the material to compensate for slippage.

title: ABB motion control products - Tangential Knife Control
description:
Tangential knife control is a standard feature of the NextMove motion controllers. This allows a knife's position to be accurately controlled around a 2D shape. Mint's powerful move buffer keywords and interpolation commands (linear and circular) make handling complex shapes easy. 

ABB's MintNC provides a complete NC front end for the machine supporting G-code, DXF and HPGL. Alternatively, the free HPGL interpreter provides complete plotter functionality.

title: Goldbach Media | Orange Movesplit auf ProSieben Schweiz im Umfeld der Simpsons
description: Der TV-Vermarkter Goldbach Media hat gemeinsam mit der Mediaagentur MediaCom und dem Kunden Orange Communications den «Movesplit», eine progressive Sonderwerbeform, erstmals in der Schweiz umgesetzt. Der TV-Vermarkter Goldbach Media hat gemeinsam mit der Mediaagentur MediaCom und dem Kunden Orange Communications den «Movesplit», eine progressive Sonderwerbeform, erstmals in der Schweiz umgesetzt. Zu sehen ist der «Movesplit» noch bis Ende Jahr auf ProSieben Schweiz im Umfeld des beliebten Formats «Die Simpsons», wo er Werbespot und Serie überraschend, innovativ und nahtlos verbindet.

title: ABB motion control products - Flying Shear Vertical Knife
description: A flying shear (using the Mint FLY command), is used to synchronize the knife with the material and ensure that the knife speed is matched to the material speed. This application also makes use of the motion controller's high speed position latch capability to accurately detect the registration marks on the material.

title: ABB motion control products - Flying Shear Rotary Knife
description:
A rotary knife is used to cut the material at the registration mark. The registration mark is detected using one of the fast position latch inputs and a flying shear is then initiated (using the Mint FLY command) to synchronize the knife with the material. 

Alternatively, the knife can be geared to the material using the Mint FOLLOW command and the knife synchronised to the material using the position latch value to determine the error. This error is corrected using the Mint OFFSET keyword.

Zu sehen ist der «Movesplit» noch bis Ende Jahr auf ProSieben Schweiz im Umfeld des beliebten Formats «Die Simpsons», wo er Werbespot und Serie überraschend, innovativ und nahtlos verbindet.

title: Abb motion control products - Product Labelling
description:
Labels are affixed to a moving bottle. A sensor (fed into the high speed position latch of the controller) on the conveyor detects an oncoming bottle, at which point the label is indexed. A second sensor on the label accurately detects the label position allowing it to be accurately placed onto the bottle. 

A servo axis on the conveyor is used to control the machine speed. This application can be solved using position lock, with a clutch (Mint FOLLOW keyword) to allow controlled acceleration and deceleration of the label while at the same time maintaining position with the conveyor. A position offset (Mint OFFSET keyword) corrects for any error between the bottle and the label.

title: ABB motion control products - Product Spacing
description:
Irregularly spaced products need to be correctly spaced for insertion into a flighted conveyor. An encoder from the flighted conveyor is fed into the auxiliary axis of the motion controller and a sensor detects the position of the flight. 

A second sensor determines the position of the product (which is fed into a high speed position latch on the controller). The infeed conveyor locks position with the outfeed conveyor using the Mint FOLLOW command. When the product is detected, it's position is calculated in relation to the next flight. A positional move (using the Mint OFFSET keyword) advances or retards the product into the flight.

title: ABB motion control products - Water Jet Cutter
description: Mint's powerful move buffer keywords and interpolation commands (linear and circular) make handling complex shapes easy. ABB's MintNC provides a complete NC front end for the machine supporting G-code, DXF and HPGL. Alternatively, the free HPGL interpreter provides complete plotter functionality.

title: ABB solar inverters services - The way we keep inverters running
description:
ABB's life cycle services for solar invertes span the entire value chain of the product from pre-purchase to replacement and recycling. One of such services is preventive maintenance. ABB recommends regular preventive maintenance of solar inverters throughout their lifetime to ensure maximum availability and minimum unplanned repair costs. With timely preventive maintenance reliability of solar inverters can be ensured and lifetime extended.

title: Börsenturbulenzen: Eine Überreaktion
description:
Dieses Video ist auch auf Englisch verfügbar:  http://youtu.be/XJWSQtYQh5g

Die Märkte haben mit grosser Unsicherheit auf die Meldung der US-Notenbank über einen möglichen Rückzug aus der expansiven Geldpolitik reagiert. Sorgen über eine mögliche Liquiditätsklemme aus Chinas Schattenbanksystem förderten diese noch. Michael Strobaek, Global Chief Investment Officer der Credit Suisse, sieht darin eine Überreaktion: Die langfristige Aussicht für Aktien sei intakt und auch in den Schwellenländern zeichne sich keine fundamentale Trendwende ab.

Zum Transkript des Artikels auf unserer Website: http://bit.ly/19H5HXA

description:
Inspiring stories of perseverance and ingenuity were shared at the inaugural Credit Suisse Entrepreneurs Forum in Sydney, May 2013.

The Forum brought together forward-thinking, innovative minds to discuss themes from Credit Suisse's white paper "From David to Goliath: How Entrepreneurs Overcome the Challenges of Company Growth". With speakers and guests from diverse backgrounds, the Forum aimed to shed light on the ways in which entrepreneurs approach challenges when bringing their businesses to the next level. The speakers shared their knowledge and gave valuable personal insights of how they managed their enterprises.

title: ABB drives - ACS880 series industrial drives
description:
For more information, visit http://www.abb.com/product/us/9AAC133421.aspx
Simplifying your world without limiting your possibilities. The new ACS880 series industrial drives are all-compatible, meaning that the drives are designed to tackle any motor-driven application, in any industry, whatever the power range. The drives can be flexibly connected to automation networks. Through the use of direct torque control (DTC), they precisely control motors such as AC induction and permanent magnet motors, using energy efficiently. Yet, despite the drives' wide-ranging capability, they are remarkably easy to use and integrate.

title: Bail-In: The Key to Ending "Too Big To Fail"
description:
In late 2008, the markets plunged into a deep systemic crisis when big banks like Lehman began to fail. In a recent speech, Wilson Ervin, who was the Chief Risk Officer of Credit Suisse in the crisis, discusses what we've learned about systemic risk and how we can avert future failures. The key is "Bail-in" -- a new technique for resolving failing banks without costly bail-outs.

title: ABB drives -- Pump's level control with ACQ810 drives
description:
For more information, visit http://www.abb.com/product/us/9AAC172853.aspx
Level control function of ACQ810 drives is used to control the filling or emptying of wastewater storage tanks. Fast-ramp starting creates a flush effect to keep pipes clear. In addition, users can define the "efficiency speed" based on the pumps best efficiency point. This helps to minimize overall energy consumption. Level control can be used within a station controlling up to eight pumps.

title: ABB drives -- Flow calculation function of ACQ810 drives
description:
For more information please visit http://www.abb.com/product/us/9AAC172853.aspx
Flow calculation provides the ACQ810 drives with a flow meter routine that accurately determines the flow rate within a pumping process. This function avoids the need for costly external flow meters and is suitable for applications where the flow data is not needed for invoicing purposes.

title: ABB drives -- Pump cleaning with ACQ810 drives
description:
For more information, visit http://www.abb.com/product/us/9AAC172853.aspx
Pump cleaning or anti-jam is used in wastewater pumping stations to prevent pump and pipe clogging. A sequence of forward and reverse runs of the pump controlled by ACQ810 drives, clean the impeller. If the pump cleaning function runs too often, an alarm is raised. The function can be timed to occur without interrupting the pumping duty cycle helping to maximize process uptime.

title: ABB drives - The new all-compatible drives portfolio
description:
For more information, visit http://new.abb.com/drives/all-compatible-solution
One drives portfolio, one common approach. ABB presents a new kind of low voltage AC drives portfolio that is all-compatible. It means that the drives are compatible with different types of users, processes and businesses. The drives improve energy efficiency of motor-driven processes and help users meet their environmental goals.

title: Leak Detection, Filter Test x3 Cycles Using Sensistor ILS500 Leak Detection System
description:
Purpose: Integral accept/reject test (x3 cycles).
Test steps: Connecting objects - closing chamber - air evacuation of object - tracer gas injection into object - accumulation (waiting) time -- sampling air from chamber - analyzing H2-content - decision (accept/reject) -- tracer gas evacuation - disconnecting object.
Instruments: Sensistor ILS500 Leak Detection System, AP29ECO Sampling Probe.
Typical range: 0.1 - 1 cc/min air or tracer gas for oil leaks in automotive industry.

title: Finding Leaks on Roll Bond Evaporators with the ILS500 Leak Detection System
description:
Purpose: Accept / Reject test.
Test steps: Evacuating air inside object - tracer gas injection -- starting scanner pump - scanning - detecting leak - decision (accept/reject) -- evacuating tracer gas.
Instruments: Sensistor ILS500 Leak Detection System, H65 Insert Sensor, sniffing scanner (customized).
Typical range: 0.05- 1 cc/min air or tracer gas. Sensitivity depends on scanning speed and size of test object.

title: Leak Detection of Engines with Sensistor ISH2000 Hydrogen Leak Detector
description:
Purpose: Locating leaks on engine (oil system).
Test steps: Injection of tracer gas into engine oil system - background level check, tracer gas level in air elevates fast because of natural leakage from engine - a flow of fresh air from the probe is activated and ventilates the tracer gas away from the sensor - leak location.
Instruments: Sensistor ISH2000 Hydrogen leak Detector, AP57 Counter Flow Probe.
Typical range: 0.3 - 5.0 cc/min air or tracer gas.

title: Leak Detection on Diesel Filter by Integral Test Using Sensistor ILS500 Leak Detection System
description:
Purpose: Accept / Reject test.
Test steps: Connecting object - closing chamber - air evacuation of object - tracer gas injection into object - accumulation (waiting) time - sampling air from chamber - analyzing H2-content -- decision (accept/reject) - tracer gas evacuation - disconnecting object.
Instruments: Sensistor ILS500 Leak Detection System, AP29ECO Sampling Probe.
Typical range: 0.1 - 1 cc/min air or tracer gas for oil leaks in automotive industry.

title: Wie stellt Nestlé die Qualität von Hundefutter sicher?
description:
Die Sicherheit unserer Nahrungsmittel hat für uns höchste Priorität – das gilt natürlich auch für Tiernahrung.

Nestlé Purina führt rund 20.000 dokumentierte Qualitätsprüfungen durch – pro Tag. Dazu zählen auch Kontrollen der Lieferanten und Rohstoffe, die hohe Standards erfüllen müssen.

Nestlé Purina erfüllt oder übertrifft alle Produktqualitäts- und Sicherheitsstandards. „Produktsicherheit steht für uns an erster Stelle. Wir überlassen da nichts dem Zufall und haben ein engmaschiges Qualitätssicherungsprogramm in unseren Werken installiert“, erklärt Michaela Buxa-Cardaun, die für das Qualitätsmanagement bei Purina verantwortlich ist.

Darüber hinaus untersucht Nestlé Purina mit einem weltweiten Expertenteam die Bedürfnisse der Tiere und investiert in Forschung und Entwicklung von Tiernahrung und Tiergesundheit.

Weiterführende Informationen:

Über die Qualitätskontrollen von Hundefutter: http://www.nestle.de/unternehmen/frag-nestle/antwort/stellt-nestle-qualitaet-hundefutter-sicher
Produktqualität: http://www.nestle.de/unternehmen/grundsaetze/produktqualitaet
Purina dreifach ausgezeichnet: http://www.nestle.de/medien/medieninformationen/purina-produkt-des-jahres-felix-tiernahrung

title: Komax Kappa 331 Kabelabisoliermaschine / Wire stripping machine
description:
Die Kappa 331 ist ein modularer Schneid- und Abisolierautomat mit Rotationsmessermodul.
Kabel schneiden, Kabel abmanteln, Kabel abisolieren, die Schneid- und Abisoliermaschinen bieten ein grosses Verarbeitungsspektrum. Kurze und lange Abisolierungen, Einzelleiter, Mantelleitungen, Koaxialkabel und andere mehrschichtige Leitungen können einfach programmiert und präzise verarbeitet werden.
Kabelabisoliermaschinen von Komax Wire - leistungsstark und präzis
The Kappa 331 is a modular cut and strip machine with a rotating blade module.
Wire cutting, wire stripping, multi conductor cable, the cutting and stripping machines are compelling in the extremely broad range of processing they cover. It allows you to easily program and precisely process short and long stripping lengths and individual wires, jacketed cables, coaxial cables and other multilayered cables.
Wire cutting and stripping machines from Komax Wire - precision and high performance

title: Head of Nestlé Research Center on Solar Impulse partnership
description: Nestlé Research is on board Solar Impulse, the world’s first attempt to circumnavigate the globe in a solar powered plane. Or rather its food is! Following a maintenance stopover in Hawaii, the plane is continuing its journey. As Thomas Beck, Head of Nestlé Research Center explains, we’ve worked with pilots Bertrand Piccard and André Borschberg, to ensure that they have the fuel they need to sustain themselves at 28,000 feet.

title: Berbagi Kemurnian Ramadan - 15 Secs

Ramadhan bisa menjadi pintu awal untuk berterima kasih kepada mereka yang ikut andil menjaga diri kita.

Mari Berbagi Kemurnian! www.berbagikemurnian.com

title: Tag der Verpackung mit Maggi und dem Grünen Punkt
description:
Exkursion entlang der Wertschöpfungskette einer Verpackung: Dazu haben Nestlé und der Grüne Punkt junge Ingenieure von Hochschulen in Leipzig und Stuttgart ins Maggi-Werk in Lüdinghausen eingeladen.

Am Beispiel der Maggi 5-Minuten-Terrine diskutierten sie, welche Anforderungen Verpackungen erfüllen müssen und wie sich ihre Gestaltung auf das Recycling auswirkt.

Nestlé engagiert sich für ökologisch optimierte Verpackungen. Bereits heute sind 88% der Verpackungen für werkstoffliches Recycling geeignet, bis 2020 sollen es 100 % sein. 

Erfahren Sie mehr darüber, wie Nestlé Verpackungsmengen reduziert und das Recycling erleichtert:
http://www.nestle.de/themenwelten/einblicke/recycling-von-verpackungen
http://www.nestle.de/themenwelten/dossier/recycling-in-deutschland

Nestlé arbeitet eng mit dem Dualen System Deutschland zusammen. Wie die Kooperation funktioniert, sehen Sie hier: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=onrKT_TLtOw

title: Solar Impulse food preparation and consumption
description: Nestlé Research has developed tailor-made menus for Solar Impulse pilots Bertrand Piccard and André Borschberg. We developed a new production method to provide them with optimal nutrition. This involves filling-up specially produced food pouches with freshly chopped ingredients (vegetables, meat, etc.), and cooking and sterilising them after they have been sealed. As a result, the nutritional value of the food and its freshness is preserved for up to three months without use of artificial preservatives. The packaging design also makes it easy for the pilots to prepare and consume the food in a confined space, while they are wearing oxygen masks.

title: Typisch Nestlé: Tense im Nescafé Dolce Gusto Werk
description:
Was ist eigentlich "Typisch Nestlé"? Ein Blick hinter die Kulissen der Lebensmittelproduktion.

Wie kommt der Kaffee in die Kapsel? Was zeichnet eine ressourcenschonende Verpackungsgestaltung aus? Und wie ist es um die Nachhaltigkeit im Kaffeeanbau bestellt? In der ersten Folge von „Typisch Nestlé“ besucht Youtuber Tense das Nescafé Dolce Gusto Werk in Schwerin.

Mit der neuen Video-Serie erweitert Nestlé den jährlichen "Tag der Qualität", bei dem Verbraucher, Blogger, Journalisten und NGOs Produktionsstandorte von Nestlé besuchen und sich über die Herstellung von Lebensmitteln informieren können. Um mehr Menschen erreichen zu können, öffnet Nestlé ihre Türen nun auch digital: In den Videos geben Mitarbeiter vor Ort transparente Einblicke, Antworten auf Fragen und zeigen, worauf es bei der Produktion ankommt. 

Erfahren Sie mehr über den Besuch von Tense http://www.nestle.de/themenwelten/einblicke/typisch-nestle/nescafe-dolce-gusto

title: Komax Alpha 550 Crimpmaschine / Crimping Machine
description:
Konstant hohe Produktivität und Flexibilität mit maximaler Präzision sind die heutigen und künftigen Anforderungen an die vollautomatisierte Kabelkonfektionierung. Alpha 550 – der neuste Crimpvollautomat für beidseitige Tüllenbestückung – erfüllt sie in der ganzen Bandbreite mit revolutionärer Technik. Dank bester Stückkostenleistung, höchster, flexibler Produktionsleistung und herausragender Qualität lassen sich durch Alpha 550 entscheidende Wettbewerbsvorteile erzielen. Die Maschine ist standardmässig mit einer ACD-Einschneideüberwachung ausgestattet.

Consistent high productivity and flexibility with maximum precision are the requirements fully automated wire processing has to meet, both today and in the future. The Alpha 550 – the latest fully automatic crimping machine for two-sided seal loading – meets these requirements across the entire spectrum with revo­lutionary technology. The Alpha 550 can yield crucial competitive advantages with its unmatched unit cost performance, flexible production output and superb quality. The machine comes with an ACD automatic conductor detector as a standard feature.

title: Produzieren Nespresso-Kapseln riesige Müllberge?
description:
Nein, Nespresso-Kapseln können zu 100 Prozent recycelt und weiter verarbeitet werden.

Dr. Kai Bijan Kroeber, Technical & Quality Director Nespresso, erklärt im Interview, wie die Kapseln recycelt werden. Da die Nespresso-Kapseln zu fast 100 Prozent aus Aluminium bestehen, können Kunden sie einfach im Gelben Sack oder der Gelben Tonne entsorgen. So gelangen sie zurück in den Recyclingkreislauf. Darüber hinaus haben Kunden die Möglichkeit, die Kapseln in Nespresso-Boutiquen zurückzugeben. Das Ziel von Nespresso ist es, die Recyclingfähigkeit bis 2020 weltweit auf 100 Prozent zu erhöhen. In Deutschland wurde das Ziel bereits erreicht.

Weiterführende Informationen:

Recyclingfähigkeit von Nespresso-Kapseln: http://www.nestle.de/unternehmen/frag-nestle/antwort/produzieren-nespresso-kapseln-muellberge
Interview mit Jochen Hertlein, Leiter Corporate Packaging bei Nestlé, über die ökologische Belastung durch Kaffeekapseln: http://www.nestle.de/themenwelten/einblicke/kaffeekapseln

title: Komax Alpha 355 S Crimpmaschine / Crimping machine
description:
Bis zu fünf Prozessmodule können auf der Alpha 355 S plaziert werden. Nebst den häufigen Standard Prozessen Crimpen und Tüllenbestückung ist weiter eine grosse Vielfalt an Prozessmodule erhältlich wie: Isolierhülsen bestücken, MIL-Crimp und Ultraschall- oder Widerstands-Schweissmodule.

You can mount up to five processing modules on the Alpha 355 S. Along with the most frequent standard processes of crimping and seal loading, you can obtain a large variety of processing modules such as: fitting with insulating sleeves, ferrules and ultrasonic or resistance welding modules.

title: Peter Brabeck spricht über das Menschenrecht auf Wasser
description:
Bis 2025 werden 1,8 Mrd. Menschen in Regionen leben, in denen nicht genügend Wasser verfügbar ist.

Wasserknappheit ist heute unsere größte Herausforderung. Peter Brabeck, Verwaltungsratspräsident, erklärt Wasser zum Menschenrecht und warum Nestlé sich für eine bessere Verwaltung und einen höheren Schutz der Wasserressourcen engagiert. 

Da das Wasser immer knapper wird, müssen wir es als wertvolle Ressource verstehen und Verschwendung vermeiden. Um diesem Problem zu begegnen sind Innovationen notwendig, die helfen in der Landwirtschaft und in der Produktion Wasser einzusparen. Nur so steht uns in unserer Umwelt Wasser langfristig und ausreichend zur Verfügung. 

---------------------------------

Wasser ist ein Menschenrecht: http://www.nestle.de/verantwortung/wasser

So engagiert sich Nestlé für sauberes Trinkwasser: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5Nm7YcivbGk

In allen Bereichen schreibt Nestlé Verantwortung groß: http://www.nestle.de/verantwortung

title: #HeartOfInnovation – innovation and scale in hypertension management in LMICs
description:
What lies at the #HeartOfInnovation? 

More than 9.4 million people are estimated to die from hypertension and high blood pressure every year. And hypertension disproportionately affects people in low- and middle-income countries.

Innovation can help tackle this problem. But what lies at the heart of innovation when it comes to management of hypertension? We brought together experts from around the world to share their experiences and give their opinions. 

Featured in this video are:
Professor Peter Piot, Director, London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine
Dr. Ann Aerts, Head of the Novartis Foundation
Dr. Peter Lamptey, Professor of Non-Communicable Diseases, London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine and President Emeritus, FHI 360
Dr. Sam Oti, Theme Leader, Non-Communicable Diseases, African Population and Health Research Center
Dr. Kenneth Connell, Deputy Dean, Faculty of Medical Sciences, University of West Indies

title: Tumi - Behind the Scenes
description:
Take a look behind the scenes at the Highline Studios in New York and see Tumi's CEO Jerome Griffith talk to our bankers, Carrie Barker and Carl Lukach, Retail and Consumer Investment Banking Division.

About the partnership between Credit Suisse and Tumi:

In many respects, Tumi, the premium business, lifestyle, and travel accessories company is a perfect case study for Credit Suisse. From the company's outset in 1975, Tumi's vision was to produce high quality travel goods for the discerning globe trotter. Tumi pioneered the use of ballistic nylon fabric, to make their travel bags and cases virtually abrasion proof. 

Tumi pioneered innovations in wheeled luggage, laptop protection, and brought their uncompromising attitude into every aspect of their designs. 

To this day, Tumi holds more than 180 patents for its design and engineering breakthroughs.
Under its new CEO, Tumi's ambitions are growing, and Jerome Griffith wants to take the brand further than simply being a world class manufacturer of luggage and business cases.

His aim is to turn Tumi into a lifestyle brand. And he looked to Credit Suisse to help him. One successful IPO later, Tumi's future is looking as good as one of its new leather iPad cases, and the company is ready for the next stage of its journey. 

About our campaign: 

For over a century and a half, our clients have been the focus of everything Credit Suisse does. And now, these clients are the focus of a new advertising campaign. Credit Suisse has enlisted the help of top photographers, artists and illustrators to create a campaign that celebrates its clients' ambitions. 

On our website, you can see examples of the campaign and of Credit Suisse's commitment to its clients in the fields of fashion, life assurance, wine making, transport and travel, as well as confectionery, communications and environmental engineering. 

Have a look at how our advertising brings these clients' ambitions to life: http://www.credit-suisse.com/clients

title: ZeroTouch - Can't Text or Call a Contact Using ZeroTouch
description:
Hi there, If you’re using ZeroTouch and cannot text or call a specific contact, we have a few tips for you. Feel free to leave us a comment with any other questions you may have at zerotouchhelp@logitech.com

First, check to see if your account and contacts are synced to your phone. Make sure the contact ZeroTouch is having trouble with is not synced from a different account, otherwise, ZeroTouch cannot access it. If this is the case, you can delete and re-add that person to your contact list.
"Sometimes only a name or a number may be synced, so be sure to manually check that all the information is there in the contact entry.

ZeroTouch prioritizes your contacts based on multiple factors, including whether or not they’re favorited or if they’re a frequent contact.

If you speak a first name, and you have multiple contacts with the similar name, ZeroTouch will prompt you to clarify which person you meant, unless one of them is a frequent contact, in which case ZeroTouch will automatically select that person. 

So if you want to reach someone with the same first name as a frequent contact, it’s faster if you just say the full first and last name.

Another thing to note is that ZeroTouch uses the American phonetic system, so if you have less common names in your contact list, ZeroTouch will better understand when you use American phonetic pronunciations. If ZeroTouch is still having trouble understanding a specific name, you can add a nickname for that person in the contact app. ZeroTouch will then listen for that nickname.

By following these steps, you should be able to text, call, or share your location with anyone on your contact list. Feel free to leave us a comment with any other questions you may have at zerotouchhelp@logitech.com

title: ZeroTouch - How to connect with your In Car Bluetooth
description:
Hey there! Today I’ll be explaining how ZeroTouch works with your in car bluetooth system and help you troubleshoot some problems you may be experiencing. If you have any additional questions please contact us at zerotouchhelp@logitech.com.

ZeroTouch is compatible with most in-car Bluetooth systems that have media streaming. If you have a bluetooth enabled car and your phone is already paired, all normal functions will route through your system when using ZeroTouch. However, ZeroTouch actions themselves will go through your phone’s speakerphone until you configure your bluetooth system or device in the ZeroTouch App. 

Here’s how you configure your Bluetooth system with ZeroTouch App. First, make sure your phone is already paired to your car in your phone’s bluetooth settings. Then, in your ZeroTouch app, go to “Use Bluetooth” and add a paired bluetooth system. 

Note that in the ZeroTouch app, you will only be able to pair with Bluetooth systems that have media streaming, so if you only have bluetooth calling in your car, you won’t find your Bluetooth device on the list. Once added, the name of the Bluetooth system should appear under “Paired Bluetooth Systems” with a check mark next to it. This means that the audio output of ZeroTouch interactions will also route through your bluetooth system instead of through your phone’s speaker. The default will be to use your in-car microphone when possible, but if ZeroTouch is having trouble accessing it, it will automatically switch to using the phone mic as input.

You can also manually switch between car mic and phone mic by click on the circle below the Bluetooth name to check or uncheck using your phone’s microphone. If the circle is unchecked, meaning ZeroTouch is using your in car mic; and it’s having trouble understanding you; you can try checking the circle to switch to the phone mic to see if it’s able to more easily understand what you are saying. 

If for some reason, adding your BT device in ZeroTouch settings is causing issues in both car and phone mic mode, you can try deleting the device in settings by clicking the X button next to it. This will go back to having ZeroTouch interactions output through your phone speakers. Again your usual Bluetooth functions such as music streaming and phone calls will still route through your car system as expected. 

If you happen to have a car that has a integrated voice recognition system and notifies you when you have incoming texts or calls, it is best to disable that so it won’t conflict with ZeroTouch. So I hope that helps you better understand how ZeroTouch works with your BT system.

If you have any additional questions please contact us at zerotouchhelp@logitech.com.

title: ZeroTouch - Removing the Metal Plate
description:
Hey there! Here are a few tips you can do to safely remove your adapter from your phone. 

To take off the metal adapter from your phone or case, you can use a thin, stiff tool like this plastic prying tool to gently wedge it underneath the adapter and lift up. Make sure you are pushing away from yourself and that your fingers are out of the way.

You can also try a thin, stiff plastic card or something with an edge that can fit underneath the adapter. 

If you need to purchase additional adapters or need guidance on where to place the metal adapter, you can contact us at zerotouchhelp@logitech.com

Remember, it’s best to find the correct position for the metal adapter before placing, since it will lose some of its stickiness once you remove it.

title: Meet the Logitech Circle. Your home security camera.
description:
Logi Circle is a modern home security camera with features that help users protect home and stay connected while they’re away. 

To protect home Circle offers smart alerts to a user's mobile device when there’s activity at home. For knowing what’s happening at home check in instantly with unlimited live 1080p video streaming (with night vision) or look back on any past activity with free cloud storage— all accessible 24/7. Circle gives users peace of mind when you’re away from home.

Staying connected to home is is simple and effortless with the friendly swipe interface. Keep up with what’s happened all day by reviewing recorded moments or a smart timelapse of the whole day. Join or listen for any moment at home with 2-way Audio. And to make sure the important moments from home are always accessible, you can move Circle off the charging ring as needed and see activity from any room. Anything you want to connect with at home can also be shared with others by downloading and sharing video clips or snapshots.

title: ZeroTouch In-Car Concierge
description:
ZeroTouch In-Car Concierge

ZeroTouch is a combination of magnetic smartphone car phone mount and voice-command app. The ZeroTouch mount pairs to your Android phone through a Bluetooth connection and lets the ZeroTouch App know when it’s docked in the car. When your phone is docked on the mount, the app is activated and runs in the background, without impairing other smartphone functions or most in-car Bluetooth wireless equipment. The ZeroTouch App offers voice texting, music, navigation and calling functions. When the phone is removed from the mount, the app is automatically deactivated.

Learn more: http://www.logitech.com/zerotouch

title: ZeroTouch - Where to Place the Metal Adapter
description:
The app will guide users for how to place the adapter
Phones that blank out with certain magnet placements
Wireless charging phones and placement
Cases vs no case and the reason for 2 adapters
Permanence of adapters
Do we want to ask users to comment for questions or post what worked for them with their phone?

When you set up the product, the app will guide you through each step, but this video better explains possible issues you may encounter if you misplace your adapter.

If you use wireless charging, we recommend to place the silver pill-shaped adapter horizontally at the bottom of your phone to prevent overheating. Here’s a list of phones that are known to have wireless charging:

Samsung s6 Edge
Nexus 5/6

If you have one of these phones, we recommend placing your adapter on the lower half of your phone to prevent your phone from going to sleep upon docking:

Nexus 6
LG G3
Samsung S4
Droid Turbo
OnePlus One
HTC One M8/M9: You must disable Dot View to use ZeroTouch

title: ZeroTouch - Mount Not Pairing
description:
Hey everyone! If you’re having trouble pairing your ZeroTouch Mount to your Android phone, here are a few things you can try.

When you’re setting up ZeroTouch:
Make sure the tab is pulled out from the mount
Make sure Bluetooth is enabled on your phone

After you set up ZeroTouch:

Make sure you have the latest ZeroTouch App version
Try turning off and on Bluetooth, then undock and re-dock your phone
Restart your phone

If all else fails, you may need to change your battery.

title: ZeroTouch - Car Compatibility
description:
We'd like to help you pick the right ZeroTouch mount for your car. 

There are two ZeroTouch car mounts: ZeroTouch Dashboard and ZeroTouch Air Vent. 

The ZeroTouch Air Vent is compatible with most car vents measuring 1.5 mm thick. Your car may have differently shaped center vents and side vents, so you should see which is the ideal location for your mount and whether that mount is compatible. It does not work with the following vents:

A circular vent that does not have parallel blades

A vent that has criss-crossed vents without sufficient space to wiggle in the mount

Recessed vents that prevent your phone from docking onto the vent

Thin vents that easily slide in different directions, which can’t hold the weight of your phone

Here's an ongoing list of cars which may have incompatible vents. Do note your vents may be different depending on the year, so if you have a car model in the list below but a different year, make sure to double check the video or the above list to see if it's compatible:

- Toyota Prius 2014
- Kia Optima 2015
- Honda Pilot 2015
- VW Tiguan 2015
- Mini Cooper 2015
- Ford Mustang/F150 2015
- Benz SL550/E350 2014
- Scion XA 2005
- Subaru BRZ 2015
- Lexus RX450 2015
- Range Rover Evoque 2015
- Mazda MX5 2015
- Lincoln Navigator/ MKZ 2015


Note: We recommend the dashboard mount if your vents are not in an ideal place for visibility or if you live in extreme climates that require you to frequently use your air vents on high because it will create too much noise to efficiently use the ZeroTouch voice-command app.

ZeroTouch Dashboard works on most car dashboards and windshields.

title: Understanding Heart Failure
description:
One in five people will develop heart failure, a life threatening condition where the heart is unable to pump enough blood around the body. This video explains how heart failure impacts the body, and patients' lives. 
Learn more at: http://www.keepitpumping.com/

title: Multiple sclerosis: battle b-neath the surface
description:
The cells of the immune system are like different types of martial artists, each with their own job to do to protect the body. In multiple sclerosis (MS), the immune system turns against a person’s central nervous system (CNS) and interrupts communications within the brain, and between the CNS and the body. Learn how B cells, important defenders in the immune system, play an important role in MS. More about Roche in MS: http://www.roche.com/ms

More videos on http://www.youtube.com/user/roche

title: Translating biology into medicine
description:
Novartis Institutes for Biomedical Research (NIBR) provides an inside perspective on Translational Medicine, talking to physicians and researchers who lead clinical trials and usher compounds from the lab into the clinic. One NIBR researcher continues to treat patients as he works on developing medicines for infectious diseases. Another says she recently led a pioneering clinical trial focused on aging. Translational medicine offers an exciting career option for physician scientists who want to have a hand in improving treatment options for a range of diseases. 

© 2014 Novartis AG

title: The future of patient-centred cancer care and research
description:
What could the future of personalised cancer patient care look like? Progress in cancer care has been accelerating over the past decades, from a not-too-distant past where even the causes of the disease were unknown, let alone how best to treat them. The general direction of travel is clear: we are now firmly in the era of personalised medicine, where the ultimate destination could be one where every individual patient receives a tailored diagnostic and treatment plan for their specific cancer.

In this video we meet Linda, a cancer patient in the not-too-distant future. See how her experience - involving such things as next-generation sequencing, liquid biopsies, clinical decision support software and fully personalised combination therapies - could be quite different from today. Learn more about Roche in Oncology: http://www.roche.com/oncology.htm

More videos from Roche on: http://www.youtube.com/user/roche

title: Diagnose Brustkrebs: Kann die Brust erhalten werden?
description:

Angelika spricht über die Zeit der Ungewissheit vor der Diagnose und der Angst vor einer Amputation. Weitere Informationen finden Sie unter https://www.brustkrebszentrale.de/.

title: Nestlé Prize in Creating Shared Value
description:
The Nestlé Prize in Creating Shared Value rewards innovative, commercially viable, high impact schemes related to nutrition, water or rural development. Specific fields of activity may include: agriculture (extension services, new technologies), food science and technology, nutrition education or micro-nutrient fortification programmes, water management, and protection of water resources. 

The award is open to individuals, not-for-profit organisations, governmental organisations, private and social enterprises, and academic institutions.

title: Brustkrebs: Ein Rückfall nach vielen Jahren
description:
Die Angst vor einem Rückfall ist für Brustkrebspatientinnen häufig lange vorhanden. Tritt die Erkrankung wieder auf, zieht sie den betroffenen Frauen den Boden unter den Füssen weg. Doch auch wenn Brustkrebs wiederkommt, gibt es viele Behandlungsmöglichkeiten. Barbara spricht über ihre ganz persönlichen Ängste nach dem Rückfall und warum sie sich doch wieder für eine Chemotherapie entschieden hat. title: A vision for healthy aging
description:
Aging is an unavoidable fact of life. Yet modern science is discovering ways to address some of the frailty that often comes with aging, including weak muscles and hearing loss. Mark Fishman, President of the Novartis Institutes for BioMedical Research, talks about his vision for healthy aging.

© 2014 Novartis AG

title: Bladder Cancer: The Facts
description:
Bladder cancer is one of the top ten most common cancers in the world, with an estimated 165,000 deaths attributed to the disease globally each year. At present, advanced bladder cancer is a disease that has a poor prognosis and has had no major treatment advances in more than 30 years. To change these figures, we must act to raise awareness of this devastating disease and its signs and symptoms in order to promote earlier diagnosis, referral and treatment.

title: Mice in Space
description: Novartis is part of a space mission! Its study sends a specific strain of mice, developed at the Novartis Institutes for BioMedical Research (NIBR), to the International Space Station (ISS) on September 20. The mice will live in microgravity during their mission, allowing scientists to learn more about muscle development and muscle atrophy.  Muscle atrophy is more gradual on earth, yet every human being experiences muscle loss as they get older. Muscle atrophy also plays a deleterious role in a number of serious diseases, including cancer. The study also marks two firsts: it’s the first time NIBR has collaborated with the Center for the Advancement of Science in Space (CASIS), the nonprofit organization that manages the ISS National Laboratory, and it’s the first time any non-human mammals will live aboard the space station. © 2014 Novartis AG
tags: the Center for the Advancement of Science in Space (CASIS)

title: Diagnose Brustkrebs: Welcher Sport tut mir gut?
description:

Darüber hinaus werden Nebenwirkungen durch regelmässige Bewegung positiv beeinflusst.  In Deutschland gibt es Sportgruppen speziell für Brustkrebspatientinnen. title: What is the future of patient-centred cancer care and research at Roche all about?
description:
The future of patient-centred cancer care and research is not just about new medicines, although these are clearly important. Key to piecing together the big picture of the future will be additional progress in a number of different areas of cancer medicine, such as in diagnostics, new clinical trial designs and endpoints, the collection and management of new data sources, and sophisticated analytics.

In this video, senior leaders from across the Roche Group give an overview of how Roche is working to advance cancer care and research in all of these vital areas. 

From our long track record in advancing oncology to our dual focus on developing tests and medicines we are uniquely positioned to lead the future of cancer care. Learn more about Roche in Oncology: http://www.roche.com/oncology.htm

More videos from Roche on: http://www.youtube.com/user/roche

title: Living with Giant Cell Arteritis (GCA)
description:
Hear from Cheryl, Richard, Judith and David - four people living with giant cell arteritis (GCA), a debilitating autoimmune disease that causes severe inflammation of the blood vessels. GCA can be difficult to diagnose as early symptoms overlap with many common conditions, resulting in delayed or incorrect diagnosis.  Dr John Stone, Director of Clinical Rheumatology also shares his expertise on GCA, as rapid intervention is key in preventing more serious complications of GCA, such as blindness.  Find more about GCA: http://www.roche.com/immunology

title: Nach der Brustkrebsbehandlung: Die Zeit der Reha mitgestalten
description:
Nach einer Brustkrebsbehandlung fällt die Rückkehr in den Alltag oft schwer. Die sogenannte Rehabilitation (Reha) kann dann dabei helfen, die psychische und körperliche Leistungsfähigkeit zurückzugewinnen. Die Behandlung umfasst Informationen zu Beruf und Alltag bis hin zu Sport- und Bewegungstherapien. Alexandra schildert, wie sie von ihrer Rehazeit profitiert hat. Weitere Informationen finden Sie unter https://www.brustkrebszentrale.de/.

title: Cancer immunotherapy: the PD-L1 pathway
description:
The role of the immune system is to protect the body from foreign invaders. This video by Roche illustrates the role T cells play in the immune system when responding to cancer. Programmed Death Ligand 1 (PD-L1) is one of the inhibitory ligands that under normal conditions help maintain immune homeostasis; however in many cancers, PD-L1 can help tumour cells evade the immune surveillance.
Find out more about Roche’s commitment to cancer immunotherapy here: http://global.researchcancerimmunotherapy.com/

More videos from Roche on:  http://www.youtube.com/user/roche

title: "Ich habe Krebs"
description:
Der Begriff Krebs ist meist negativ besetzt und mit vielen Ängsten verbunden. Das Wort auszusprechen und über die Erkrankung zu reden, fällt vielen Betroffenen deshalb schwer. Angelika schildert ihren ganz persönlichen Umgang mit der Diagnose Brustkrebs. Weitere Informationen finden Sie unter https://www.brustkrebszentrale.de/.
Mehr Videos von Roche: http://www.youtube.com/user/roche

title: Früherkennung von Brustkrebs
description:
Ab dem 30. Lebensjahr hat jede Frau gesetzlichen Anspruch auf eine jährliche Untersuchung zur Früherkennung von Brustkrebs. Ausserdem wird empfohlen, dass alle Frauen ihre Brust einmal monatlich selbst untersuchen. Angelika spricht über ihre eigenen Erfahrungen und die Ungewissheit nach der Untersuchung. Weitere Informationen finden Sie unter https://www.brustkrebszentrale.de/.
Mehr Videos von Roche: http://www.youtube.com/user/roche

title: Interroll Symposium 09, Dieter Specht, Company History - German spoken
description: With tons of enthusiasm, zero capital and a loan of DM 25,000, Dieter Specht and Hans vom Stein set the Interroll ball rolling in the year 1959. The business that began in a garage in Wermelskirchen near Cologne/Düsseldorf has since become a world market leader in the materials handling market, with 1'300 employees and a global network of expertise in development, production and sales.

title: Interroll Flow Storage, Kempf Beverage Distribution Center
description:
Interroll flow storage systems are space saving and compact - there are no intermediate aisles, but only one input and one output aisle. All products are available by the shortest route in one aisle.
It is the fastest and most cost-effective distribution system for assorted products.
Interroll flow storage provides simple, structured stock control with unlimited flexibility and tailor made design and layout.
A conventional system needs double as much space and more aisles, meaning 7 to 8 times longer travel routes for the operators. Consequently, more forklift truck drivers are needed and retrieval and dispatch takes much more time.

title: Interroll Sorter at Solar Denmark & AEC Usa
description:
Interroll Crossbelt Sorters are designed to provide their users the necessary security:
Top quality due to proven mechanical design 
High throughput of a broad range of products 
Highly economical, even for low throughputs of 2,000 items/hour 
High availability do easy-to-operate sortation technology 
Long-term gain on short-term ROI (2 - 3 years) 

Interroll Horizontal Crossbelt Sorters are characterised by their flexible, space utilising routing with curves which also conquer inclines and declines. Merges and destinations can be arranged in various ways and be optimised to increase the system's performance. With an appropriate layout it is possible to create several sortation areas with just one cycle.

title: The power of empathy through augmented reality: ViaOpta Simulator app
description:
Using the camera in a smart device (phone/tablets), healthcare practioners HCPs are now able to visualise what patients with ophthalmic conditions go through, to garner empathy for the patient’s condition and, as a result, improve outcomes and treatment methods.

Virtually replicated syndromes and corresponding scientific descriptions come together to form a portable augmented reality experience.

Designed specifically for healthcare professionals, your first person look at living with a visual impairment.
Available for iOS and Android.

Learn more: http://viaopta-apps.com/ViaOptaSimulator.html

© 2016 Novartis AG

title: En film om Multipel Skleros (MS) - www.msliv.se
description:
Det kan kännas svårt att få reda på att man har multipel skleros (MS). Många reagerar med ilska, chock, depression eller oro. Många känner också behov av att skaffa sig kontroll. Det finns mycket resurser och stöd och många effektiva behandlingsalternativ som kan hjälpa dig.

DaybyDay är en app för iPhone och Android, speciellt framtagen för dig som lever med MS. Appen är ett verktyg med dagboksfunktion som gör det enkelt för dig att registrera din hälsostatus över tiden, du kan även skapa ett diskussionsunderlag att ta med dig till nästa läkarbesök. 

Läs mer på http://www.msliv.se/
