title: Apprentis retraités – Un réalisateur (24 ans) rencontre une icône de la mode (80 ans)
description:
Christa de Carouge, la Grande Dame de la mode suisse, rencontre le jeune réalisateur Christophe M. Saber. Restez créatif jusqu'à la fin de sa vie? Pour tous deux une évidence. Mais qu'est-ce que la rébellion à partir d'un certain âge?
Christophe M. Saber est à la fois protagoniste et réalisateur. Il a effectué sa formation de cinéaste aux Etats-Unis et à Lausanne. La création artistique est une vocation qu'il souhaite poursuivre une fois à la retraite. En 2015, il a remporté le Swiss Award du meilleur court métrage avec Discipline.

Devenir apprenti retraité
Quatre jeunes font un stage dans la vie d'un senior. Ils constatent à quel point la vie d'un senior peut être diversifiée et dynamique. 
Les quatre courts métrages constituent le cœur de la nouvelle campagne Swiss Life «Apprentis retraités» et remettent en question les idées de chacun sur la vie plus longue en toute liberté de choix. 
Sur notre site www.apprentis-retraites.ch, nous proposons, en plus des quatre films, la possibilité de se glisser pour quelques heures dans la peau d'un senior à la vie passionnante.

title: JRGUTHEM 2T - GF Piping Systems
description:
JRGUTHERM 2T is a thermostatic circulation controller for hot water with two angle-seat valves and optional thermal disinfection. Thanks to the two thermostats, this circulation controller offers high control accuracy in normal and disinfection operation. The temperature can be set to the precise degree required. The exact thermal and hydraulic balancing enables energy savings. No more complex calculations of preset values. Plant constructors and operators therefore benefit from an optimally adjusted system.

title: Installation video COOL FIT PE Plus - GF Piping Systems - English
description:
COOL-FIT PE Plus is a fully pre-insulated plastic pipe system for secondary cooling loops. It consists of the tried and tested HDPE carrier pipe SDR 17, PN10, a high density PUR insulation and a hard HDPE outer jacket which is impact resistant and due to its black color UV-resistant. Besides the pre-insulated pipes and fittings, Georg Fischer also offers pre-insulated ELGEF sockets, which signifcantly reduces the installation time.The pre-insulated system is available in the dimensions d250/355 -- d450/630.

title: Ocean Park Hong Kong - One project of AAT in collaboration with GF Piping Systems
description:
The key success for the relationship between AAT and GF Piping Systems is collaboration. 

The synergy between AAT and GF Piping Systems has grown in strength since the original relationship developed in the late 1990s. AAT truly appreciates the position when they have particular requirements. GF Piping System takes these recommendations and help develop piping systems that suit their project needs. And alternatively in turn AAT listens to GF Piping Systems suggestions. This is the key to the relationship success. 

The products used within this project include PVC using predominately schedule 80 (both pipes and fittings) - with around 4 kilometres of piping being installed, Type 567 Butterfly Valves and hundreds of various valves and thousands of ball valves.

Hong Kong Ocean Park consists of 17 aquariums with the main tank holding 5.4 million litres. Water travels at 170 litres per second throughout the aquarium. The Life Support Systems (LSS) which run the aquarium consist of individual skid mounted LSS for each individual aquarium.

Officially the Hong Kong Aquarium started construction in October 2009, and the aquarium opened its doors to the public in March 2011 - at a cost of over US$180m.

title: A Loving Dad whose Care for Toy Safety Reaches the World –玩具安全的背後
description:
Wayne is our Technical Services Manager with Toys and Juvenile products services in Hong Kong. Wayne recently became a father and it goes without saying that toys are now part of his daily routine. Take a look at how he juggles his work life and personal life with toys and how he assesses basic toy safety from a professional perspective.

As part of our series on “Passions that matter - Everyday Safety and Quality”, Wayne also mentions about the notable shift in the world’s toy market that prompts us to better help our clients bring more safe toys to new markets

Wayne 是我們香港的玩具及嬰幼兒產品服務部的技術經理，Wayne同時亦是一位年輕爸爸，可想而知他的每一天都離不開林林總總的玩具。了解多一點Wayne在工作上生活上與玩具結下不解緣，從他的專業角度看看一件玩具最基本的安全考慮。Wayne亦會分享一些全球玩具市場的最新變化，促使我們更積極為客戶開拓新市場，將安全的玩具產品送到全球每個角落。此片段是「我們的熱誠」系列之「消費品安全質素篇」其中一節。

title: Behind the Glossy Face is a Safety Champion-化妝護理產品安全的背後
description:
Queenie is our Technologist with Cosmetics, Personal Care & Household product services in Hong Kong.  Like many other ladies, Queenie certainly has beauty and skin care tips to share but beneath her immaculate look lies her deep knowledge in worldwide regulations on cosmetic products.  Take a sneak peek in her daily cosmetic pouch and uncover some of the quality and safety aspects of daily products.

As part of our series on “Passions that matter-Everyday Safety and Quality”, Queenie also first introduces one of the most important purpose-built facilities here in Hong Kong and furthers on what she is doing to make sure consumers be spoilt for safe and effective choices in the market.

Queenie 是我們香港的化妝品及個人護理產品服務部的技術專家。跟很多女土們一樣，Queenie都有自己一套的美容護膚心得，但對她更在行的是全球各地針對化妝品護膚品的安全法規。由Queenie的私人化妝袋開始，從她的專業角度看看幾種常用產品。另外她亦會率先介紹在香港其中一個獨特的實驗室設備以及談談她怎樣幫助客戶打入各地市場，讓消費者可以選擇更多安全及有效的產品。此片段是「我們的熱誠」系列之「消費品安全質素篇」其中一節。

title: Novelist Xu Xi thinks into the future
description:
For the Open Minds project we capture a global diversity of voices. What do people from around the world think about longevity, food security, climate change, natural disasters, sustainable energy solutions? In this clip Xu Xi, a Hong Kong based English language novelist, talks about the younger generation, the big jump in technology and the changing human brain. title: Family Man seeking Home Sweet Home for all-家居安全的背後
description:
Birkoff is our Operations Manager with Hardgoods services in Hong Kong.  Birkoff has a remarkable experience in the quality and safety aspects of an extensive range of household products from furniture, kitchenware to eyewears and fashion accessories, just to name a few.  But what sets Birkoff and his team apart is their knack and passion in thinking out of the box and creating new testing solution for the most unexpected of our everyday products.  Let’s hear what he says.

As part of our series on “Passions that matter-Everyday Safety and Quality”, Birkoff also shares on how the thought of product quality has evolved over the years along with people’s lives.

Birkoff 是我們香港的輕工產品服務部的營運經理。他在SGS已經工作了超過13年，對日常家居個人用品由傢俬、廚具以至眼鏡及配飾等的安全及質素方面都擁有豐富經驗。但Birkoff跟他的專業團隊不時還會遇到一些意想不到的日常產品，需要他們從不同用家的角度，真正的跳出框框去建立一些嶄新的測試方案。另外，Birkoff亦會分享一些社會的轉變如何提升個別產品的安全關注。此片段是「我們的熱誠」系列之「消費品安全質素篇」其中一節。

title: Cultivation of microalgae - GF Piping Systems
description:
Algae - raw material of the future grown in bioreactors made with plastic pipes

GF Piping Systems is closely involved in the research and development of the first bioreactors for algae production available in Europe and the USA. The new piping system designed for this application is made of transparent plastic. The successful collaboration with development partners LGem (NL), TH Wildau (D), Texas University in Austin (USA) and AlgEternal (USA) has led to the release of the first bioreactors for algae cultivation.

In cooperation with LGem, tests for cultivating special aqueous algae in bioreactors have been running successfully since 2007. In 2010 the Technical University Wildau in Berlin joined the project as another development partner. Professor Franz Xaver Wildenauer, TH Wildau/Berlin, reports: "The potential of the new biotechnology is huge and so are the necessary investments, which is why we are conducting applied research together with our partner GF Piping Systems."

The high-performance pipes and fittings for the bioreactors were developed by GF Piping Systems. The engineers succeeded finding the right balance between the amount of light which passes through and the durability of the material because plastics such as polyvinylchloride (PVC) undergo changes when exposed to sunlight over long periods of time. The new piping system features high UV resistance and promotes or accelerates biomass production through photosynthesis. For the development of these special pipes, GF Piping Systems already received the international "Gold Solvin Award" for innovation in 2010. 

Algae are often called the raw material of the future. There are over 40,000 different types of algae. Because of their high sugar, starch, oil and omega3 fatty acids content, a productivity which is seven times higher than corn can be realized. These cultivated plants can be processed into biomass and biofuel. Furthermore, the organisms bind carbon dioxide (CO2), which they require for growth.

At present, diverse processes are being examined on connecting bioreactors to power plants. This should lead to a reduction in environmentally hazardous CO2 emissions, while at the same time creating biomass.

Biomass is highly sought-after in the cosmetic industry and in food production, such as fish food. The biodiesel gained from algae is considered a fuel of the future in the USA.

What do researchers know that the rest of us don’t? | Peter A. Diamond | UBS Nobel Perspectives
description: To help him think about his dissertation topic, Peter A. Diamond’s teacher gave him Kenneth Arrow’s Social Choice to read, and told him to “find the mistake”. He realized, as a researcher, you “look for the things that aren’t said and take it from there.” Discover more about Peter A. Diamond https://www.ubs.com/peter-diamond and explore the Nobel Perspectives series https://www.ubs.com/nobel

title: Is the US pension system sustainable? | Peter A. Diamond | UBS Nobel Perspectives
description:
Peter A. Diamond explains that if there’s not enough money coming into a pension system to cover the outgoings, then the authorities can either raise taxes or reduce benefits. As both options are politically unpopular, the US pension reform in 1983 cut benefits, but managed public response by delaying the introduction of the adjustment.

Discover more about Peter A. Diamond https://www.ubs.com/peter-diamond and explore the Nobel Perspectives series https://www.ubs.com/nobel

title: Corporate Movie - GF Automotive - English
description:
GF Automotive

Innovation hat bei uns Tradition. Seit Jahrzehnten bieten wir unseren Kunden Problemlösungen für die moderne Automobiltechnik. Von der Produktidee über ihre Realisierung bis hin zur Betreuung der Serienproduktion -- unsere Spezialisten in Forschung und Entwicklung, Gießtechnik oder in den Kundenteams entwickeln die Lösungen.

Jedes Bauteil ist das Ergebnis eines intensiven partnerschaftlichen Dialogs zwischen dem Kunden und unseren Spezialisten aus Forschung und Entwicklung, Gießtechnik, Bearbeitung und Montage. Unsere Gießereien sind Vorreiter, was den Einsatz neuer Managementsysteme in der Qualitätssicherung und im Umweltschutz betrifft. 
Seit Jahrzehnten vertrauen unsere Kunden auf die hohe Qualität und Zuverlässigkeit unserer Bauteile für Antrieb, Fahrwerk und Karosserie. Mit ihnen leisten wir einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Mobilität und tragen dazu bei, die Fahrt mit dem Auto angenehm und sicher zu machen. 

Ganz im Sinne des Unternehmensversprechens: Adding Quality to People's Lives.

Organisation: 
 International tätige Unternehmensgruppe mit zehn Werken in drei Ländern.

Firmensitz:  
Schaffhausen, Schweiz

Arbeitsschwerpunkt:  
Entwicklung und Produktion hoch beanspruchbarer Gussteile für die Automobilindustrie und deren Zulieferer.

Produktionsstandorte: 
Deutschland, Österreich und China

Marktstellung: 
In vielen Bereichen Technologie- und Marktführer in Europa. Ausgewiesene Kompetenz in allen für die Serienfertigung relevanten Gießverfahren (Sandgießen, Kokillengießen, Druckgießen) und Werkstoffen (Eisen, Aluminium, Magnesium).

title: The new banknotes – substrate
description: This film shows how the substrate for the new Swiss banknotes is produced. The issuance of these notes marks the first time that the substrate will be used for banknote production anywhere in the world. Called Durasafe®, it is a specially developed, three-layer substrate, comprising an inner polymer layer sandwiched between two outer layers of cotton paper. This construction allows new security features to be incorporated and lends the note mechanical stability.

title: The new banknotes – design and security features
description:
The film shows a variety of design elements and security features that can be found on the new Swiss banknotes. It invites the viewer to discover the note’s many facets. 
 
 The new banknotes have numerous security features – some new, some tried and tested – offering a range of different ways to check if a note is genuine. A distinction is made between visual and tactile features that the general public can readily check and features that can only be recognised with the aid of special devices or that are machine-readable.

title: Machine WM 630 CNC -  GF Piping Systems
description:
Butt Fusion 

Jointing Butt fusion technology is the safe, reliable and favorable jointing for a wide dimension range. 

GF Piping Systems offers mechanical, hydraulic and CNC-guided fusion machines for on site constructions and the workshop. The fusion areas of the pipes and fittings are heated to fusion temperature and joined by means of mechanical pressure, without using additional materials. A homogeneous joint results. 

Butt fusion jointing requires adequate technical know-how, which can be acquired in the appropriate training courses. Your GF Piping Systems representative will gladly provide you with information about training possibilities.

The WM 630 CNC Machine from GF Piping Systems is a machine for jointing segmented fittings like bends from d315 - 630 mm for high pressure applications and is able to produce T and Y fittings from d315 - 500 mm, special accessories are required Machine description:  
● Fully automated fusion process by the use of state of the art PLC and touch screen 
● Highest flexibility in the pipe preparation process 
● Data storage and transfer via USB to the PC 
● Data management by SUVI® WIN-WELD 
● Distortion - free, sturdy machine frame 
● Electric and hydraulic components separated in the frame 
● The main clamping tools are mounted on supports each of which can be adjusted transversely to the pipe axis 
● Each clamping tool can be turned max. 22.5° and assembled with a set of reductions d315 - 560 mm  
● Hydraulically opening and closing of the upper clamping tools, manual locking with bolts and nuts  
● Precision heating element with electronic temperature control (12000 W) 
● High-quality PTFE coating with long service life 
● Insertion hydraulically operated 
● Powerful planer (1100 W) with optimized cutting geometry for even and chatter-free planing 
● Load transfer via robust chain drive  
● Insertion hydraulically operated  
● During the planing process each slide could be moved separately (single sided planing)

For more information visit our website: 
http://www.gfps.com/appgate/ecat/common_flow/100005/COM/en/index.html

title: 9900 Transmitter - Georg Fischer Signet - English
description:
9900 Transmitter 

The  9900 Transmitter from Georg Fischer Signet provides a single channel interface for many different parameters including Flow, pH/ORP, Conductivity/Resistivity, Salinity, Pressure, Temperature, Level and other sensors that output a 4 to 20 mA signal. The extra large (3.90"x 3.90") auto-sensing backlit display features "at-a-glance" visibility that can be viewed at 4-5 times the distance over traditional transmitters. The highly illuminated display and large characters reduce the risk of misreading or misinterpreting the displayed values. The display shows separate lines for units, main and secondary measurements as well as a dial-type digital bar graph.

The 9900 Transmitterfrom Georg Fischer Signet is offered in both panel or field mount versions. Both configurations can run on 12 to 32 VDC power (24 VDC nominal). The 9900 Transmitter can also be loop powered with compatible sensors.

Designed for complete flexibility, plug-in modules allow the unit to easily adapt to meet changing customer needs. Optional modules include Relay, Direct Conductivity/Resistivity, H COMM and a PC COMM configuration tool. The unit can be used with default values for quick and easy programming or can be customized with labeling, adjustable minimum and maximum dial settings, and unit and decimal measurement choices.

For more information visit our website:

title: Membranventil Typ 514, 515, 517 und 519 - GF Piping Systems - Deutsch
description:
Die neue Membranventil-Generation von GF Piping Systems setzt neue Massstäbe in Bezug auf Sicherheit, Effizienz und einfache Anwendung. 

Statt der üblichen vier Metallschrauben verfügt es nur noch über eine zentrale Kunststoffverschraubung - diese korrosionsfreie Verbindung zeichnet sich durch ein homogenes Temperaturverhalten, eine gleichmässige Flächenpressung und höchste Dichtheit bis 16 bar aus. 

Die optimale Durchflussgeometrie bietet Ihnen den doppelten Durchfluss bei gleichem Energieaufwand. Bei annähernd linearen Durchflusseigenschaften garantiert dies stabile Prozesse. 

Darüber hinaus wurde beim Abgangsventil der Dichtsteg bis unmittelbar an die Rohrwand des Hauptrohrs gerückt. Der Totraum wurde so auf ein absolutes Minimum reduziert und damit die Hygiene maximal erhöht. 

Serienmässige Ausstattungsmerkmale wie ein verriegelbares Handrad, zweifarbiger Anzeigestift oder eine Schnittstelle für einen selbstjustierenden Endschalter setzten neue Standards in Sachen Bedienerfreundlichkeit.

Für weitere Informationen besuchen Sie unsere Webseite:
http://www.gfps.com/appgate/ecat/common_flow/100005/COM/de/index.html

title: The UBS Future of Finance Challenge in 2015
description:
On the 12th of August 2015, UBS launched The UBS Future of Finance Challenge, an open competition for entrepreneurs and technology startups around the world. UBS was looking for innovative and potentially disruptive technological ideas and solutions that will support the transformation of the banking industry. On the 10th of December 2015, UBS announced the winners of the Challenge at the Global Final held in Zurich, Switzerland. Three winners of the UBS Future of Finance Challenge were selected from over 600 participants from 52 countries. It is UBS’s aspiration to support the competition winners in their bid to commercialise and scale their ideas and technologies by leveraging on its significant global presence, deep expertise in global banking and eco-system of innovation partners. Rewards for the regional and global finalists include cash prizes and acceleration opportunities worth over USD $300,000 and over 300 hours of dedicated coaching and mentoring from UBS experts and partners.

Check out the website to find all the winners, runner-ups and
winners of the acceleration awards here: 
https://www.ubs.com/innovate

title: Temenos - Wealth Management
description:
http://www.temenos.com

The centre of gravity in private banking and wealth management is changing as client service and value added delivery become key competitive differentiators. The established private wealth management firms are under threat from new competitors. Evolving, 'heavier touch' regulatory and compliance frameworks are increasing your operating costs. Then there's the new breed of well-informed, more technically savvy clients with higher expectations that take a superior investor experience for granted.
 
The clear trend is that private banks and wealth managers must alter their service infrastructures to keep pace. Greater operational efficiency, sharper performance and smarter delivery that collectively fit the client like a glove are must-have success factors -- not just to succeed but also to survive. Historically the private wealth management sector is technologically underfunded. With legacy and manual systems still the norm rather than the exception, it's the next generation wealth software solutions that hold the key to supporting your client relationship managers - and enhancing the entire private wealth management experience for your clients.
 
Welcome to Temenos Private Wealth Management Software Solutions.
 
Central to delivering this high performance is a range of wealth management software solutions that provide an integrated approach to financial service processes and service provision, CRM, portfolio management, performance, asset allocation and data management. That's why it makes good business sense to work with a proven, world-class wealth management software partner able to deliver your client promise, lower your costs, maximise your profitability and add compelling competitive edge. With a best-selling pedigree and superior functionality that's proven worldwide, our solutions give you the confidence to take your private wealth management and private banking operations to the next level.
 
For more information on wealth management and private banking solutions from the leading experts in the area, come and talk to Temenos. Contact us at info@temenos.com.

title: Temenos - The Productivity Paradox
description:
http://www.temenos.com

There's increasing evidence that incremental IT investments do not produce positive changes in productivity - but the reverse. They provide negative returns.
 
The adoption of packaged core banking software, particularly in conjunction with process optimisation, can lead to the increasing returns on IT investment that have historically evaded the banking industry.

title: Temenos Microfinance
description:
http://www.temenos.com

We understand microfinance and community banking ...
With around 40% of the world's population living on less than two dollars a day, microfinance and community banking offers those on low incomes access to basic financial services such as loans, savings, money transfers and microinsurance. Playing a major role in the development of nations across Asia, Africa and Latin America, microfinance actively supports the sources of income that help people climb steadily out of poverty while improving living conditions and opportunities for their families.
 
Including non-bank financial institutions, credit unions, co-operative banks, building societies and smaller commercial, microfinance also includes major banks that recognise the strategic value of extending their reach to new customers in the developing world. The market is growing worldwide and is already worth over US$80 billion. But how do you provide a quality microfinance service with a robust, flexible and scalable banking software infrastructure while at the same time keeping a tight rein on costs? You do this by working with a partner who understands the specialised needs of microfinance and has the right banking software solutions that are proven, efficient and cost-effective.
 
Welcome to Temenos Microfinance and Community Banking Software Solutions.
We have supported the microfinance and community banking market for over a decade. Our T24 for Microfinance banking software solution provides you with a pre-configured model bank based on microfinance and community banking best practices. It comes with all the control, efficiency, productivity, scalability and low-cost business benefits you expect from the world's most popular banking software solution.

title: Temenos - Temenos Connect
description:
http://www.temenos.com

Banking has changed... the world has gone "MAD"
Do you remember when banking was conducted in the branch from 9-4 Monday through to Friday? Well not anymore!
 
We now live in a world where Multiple Access Devices (MAD) are pervasive -- 1 in 2 of us now has a smartphone or tablet, or both -- and this is changing the way we consume products and services. Essentially, we want to be able to do things anytime, anywhere and across any channel -- banking included. And we want the experience to be rich and interactive.
 
Banks face a significant challenge meeting customer expectations.
Nonetheless, banks are struggling to offer customers the user experience they expect. The IT infrastructure at banks was put in place a long time ago -- in fact, in most cases, long before the internet. It was never designed for, and is struggling to cope with, a "MAD" world. Launching products and services across multiple channels and devices is taking too long, is too costly and the user experience is variable at best. Consequently, banks risk damaging their brand, are missing out on opportunities to increase wallet share and, most importantly, are in danger of losing their best customers to new banking market entrants. 
  
A new approach is needed. 
The only way for banks to get ahead in a "MAD" world is to take an entirely new approach. We are undergoing a generational shift in technology and consumer behaviour and banks need a next-generation answer.
 
The answer is to adopt a User Experience Platform (UXP). A UXP introduces a presentation layer across a bank's IT infrastructure which allows them to launch applications faster, generate a consistent user experience across all channels and, importantly, without compromising on security.

Introducing Temenos Connect.
Temenos Connect is a suite of front office products which combine the market leading UXP technology with the market leading banking application capabilities.

title: Building Tour of Schindler Elevator's LEED Gold Certified Facility in Hanover, Pennsylvania
description:
Take a first-hand look inside Schindler's LEED Gold certified elevator manufacturing facility in Hanover, Pennsylvania! For more information, photos and an infographic, visit our website! http://bit.ly/1oXrt1I 

The facility reinforces Schindler's commitment to environmental protection and sustainability, earning North America's first LEED Gold green building certification for an elevator manufacturing plant. 

A part of the Schindler global supply chain, the 150,000 square-foot facility will provide support for the North American market and will focus on producing customer-facing components such as doors, entrances, jambs and elevator cab interiors. The plant also includes the company's Order Consolidation Center (OCC), an order fulfillment warehouse which help Schindler achieve lead times that are among the shortest in the industry for customer delivery.

title: Schindler PORT Technology at the Humana Waterside Building
description:
Hear directly from Mike Roberts, Steve Evans and John Brown with Humana why Schindler PORT Technology was the obvious choice for them when it came time to upgrade their elevator system! 

Schindler's PORT Technology brings abundant energy-saving features in addition to its
advanced dispatching capabilities. Each PORT terminal's proximity sensor tells it when to be active and at all other times puts it into low-energy consumption mode.

When the terminal screen illuminates, an ambient light sensor determines only the brightness level required, again optimizing energy usage. The PORT Technology ensures elevator trips are as efficient as possible. This produces a very resourceful use of
energy, even during heavy traffic.

During light traffic, the PORT Energy Control Option places nonessential elevators into an energy-conserving standby mode.

title: Schindler Modular Gearless Machine
description:
Schindler modular gearless machine for mid- rise buildings is specifically designed to be used in existing machine rooms, while maintaining optimized ride quality. It's compact design and minimum dimensions allow the parts to fit through standard machine room doors, and be assembled in the machine room. They deliver smooth, quiet, gearless operation and other benefits including:

− Less net power usage means lower monthly utility bills
− Possibility of rebates from government-sponsored and local utility programs
− Potential to earn points toward LEED certification for existing buildings
− Dual brakes for added safety
− Modular design allows easier delivery and faster installation
− Replaces inefficient geared machines

Find out more at: http://www.schindler.com/content/us/internet/en/modernization/solutions-for-mid-rise-buildings1/_jcr_content/rightPar/downloadlist/downloadList/16_1340812666107.download.asset.16_1340812666107/Mid-Rise%20Gearless%20DB_041612.pdf

title: "Cookies and Cream Ref Cake" | NESTLE CREAM | Nestlé PH
description:
COOKIES & CREAM REF CAKE

INGREDIENTS

16 pieces  chocolate cream-filled sandwich cookies
1 pack  NESTLE All Purpose Cream
One fourth cup confectioner's sugar
6 slices                      store-bought chiffon or sponge cake
One half cup semisweet miniature chocolate morsels
4 pieces                      chocolate cream-filled sandwich cookies, coarsely  
                                          crushed

PROCEDURE

1. In an 8.5" x 4" loaf pan with waxed paper or aluminum foil. 
2. Arrange 8 pieces of sandwich cookies at the bottom of the prepared pan and set aside.
3. Beat cream with confectioner's sugar until thick. Spread 3-4 tbsp of the mixture on top of the prepared cookies.
4. Arrange 3 slices of chiffon cake on top of the cream mixture, followed by another layer of sandwich cookies. Finish with the remaining cream. Sprinkle with chocolate morsels and crushed sandwich cookies. Cover with foil or waxed paper and freeze for 2 hours or until set. To serve, unmold, slice and arrange in a platter.

title: Electrofusion Units MSA 330 and MSA 340 - GF Piping Systems - English
description:
Electrofusion Jointing 

In the electro fusion process a heating wire permanently mouled into the fitting gets heated by current at a low voltage. The surrounding material around the wire gets melted and expands due to the warming. The melt starts closing the gap between pipe and fitting, leading to a heat transition to the pipe which also gets heated and melts in the welding zone. The pipe material also expands. 

The increasing material expansion between pipe and fitting, which is hindered by the cold zones outside the welding zone, leads to a build up a welding pressure between pipe and fitting and a homogeneous welding connection emerges. 

Electrofusion jointing requires adequate technical know-how, which can be acquired in the appropriate training courses. Your GF Piping Systems representative will gladly provide you with information about training possibilities.

For more information visit our website: 
http://www.gfps.com/appgate/ecat/common_flow/100005/COM/en/index.html

title: Corporate Movie - GF Piping Systems - English
description:
Georg Fischer - Adding Quality to People's Lives 

GF Piping Systems is one of three companies within the Georg Fischer group and a leading supplier of plastic and metal pipe systems with a global market presence.

Our portfolio offers connection technology, fittings, fixtures, sensors and pipes for the treatment and distribution of water as well as the safe transport of industrial fluids and gases. 

GF Piping Systems supplies leading innovative technical solutions for domestic engineering applications, the chemical process industry, food & beverage, life sciences, the microelectronics, shipbuilding, energy, water and gas supply industries as well as potable water treatment. 

Our distributors in more than 25 countries and representatives in a further 80 countries guarantee customer service around the clock. Production facilities in Europe, Asia and the US are customer focused and comply with all local requirements. 

Georg Fischer's registered offices have been located in Schaffhausen, Switzerland, since the company was founded in 1802.

title: Les nouveaux billets – La production et la mise en circulation
description: Ce film est consacré à la fabrication des nouveaux billets de banque suisses. Il donne une vue d’ensemble des différentes étapes du processus: fabrication du substrat, impression, contrôle initial, stockage et mise en circulation. Il présente aussi en détail le substrat spécial qu’est le Durasafe® et les différents modes d’impression.

title: Les nouveaux billets – Le substrat
description: Ce film présente la fabrication du matériau de base (substrat) des nouveaux billets de banque suisses. A la date de l’émission, c’est la première fois à l’échelle mondiale que ce substrat est utilisé pour une série de billets de banque. Il s’agit du Durasafe®, un substrat à trois couches conçu spécialement à cet effet. Il se compose, à l’extérieur, de deux couches de papier fabriquées à partir de coton et, au centre, d’une couche de polymère. Cette structure permet d’intégrer de nouveaux éléments de sécurité et renforce la résistance mécanique du billet.

title: Les nouveaux billets – Les éléments graphiques et de sécurité
description:
Ce film présente les différents éléments graphiques et de sécurité dont sont dotés les nouveaux billets de banque suisses, et nous invite à découvrir ces derniers sous toutes leurs facettes. 

Les nouveaux billets de banque allient certains éléments de sécurité ayant déjà fait leurs preuves et d’autres, novateurs, qui permettent une vérification complète de l’authenticité des billets. Distinction est faite entre les éléments visuels et tactiles destinés au public, et les éléments reconnaissables uniquement avec un moyen auxiliaire ou lisibles par machine.

En tant que fournisseur de systèmes de tuyauteries et composantes en matières synthétiques et métaux, nous produisons et développons des solutions répondant aux besoins des clients pour le transport sûr de liquides et de gaz. Nous vous offrons des produits de haute qualité pour les applications dans l'industrie, la distribution d'eau et de gaz et la technique du bâtiment. Grâce à des contrôles très rigoureux et à de grandes exigences en matière de pureté, nous garantissons une circulation du fluide optimale et un confort maximal. 

Tout à partir d'une seule source GF Piping Systems est un des trois principaux secteurs d'activités du groupe Georg Fischer offrant une gamme de plus de 40 000 produits pour des applications et domaines très variés: techniques de raccordement, raccords, robinetterie, instruments de mesure et tubes.

title: Les nouveaux billets – Le substrat (version pour malentendants)
description: Ce film présente la fabrication du matériau de base (substrat) des nouveaux billets de banque suisses. A la date de l’émission, c’est la première fois à l’échelle mondiale que ce substrat est utilisé pour une série de billets de banque. Il s’agit du Durasafe®, un substrat à trois couches conçu spécialement à cet effet. Il se compose, à l’extérieur, de deux couches de papier fabriquées à partir de coton et, au centre, d’une couche de polymère. Cette structure permet d’intégrer de nouveaux éléments de sécurité et renforce la résistance mécanique du billet.

title: Magmeter Flow Sensor Type 2551 - Georg Fischer Signet - English

Magmeter Flow Sensor Type 2551 

The 2551 Magmeter is an insertion style magnetic flow sensor that features no moving parts. The patented* sensor design is available in corrosion-resistant materials to provide long-term reliability with minimal maintenance costs. 

The 2552 Metal Magmeter from Georg Fischer Signet features all-stainless steel construction. The PVDF nosepiece and FPM O-rings are the only other wetted materials.

The 8550 Flow Transmitter is an advanced solution that converts the signal from all Georg Fischer Signet flow sensors into a 4-20 mA signal for long distance transmission, and offers the unique feature of dual input and output capability.

title: Swiss Re's The essential guide to reinsurance iPad App - Out Now!
description:
What's reinsurance? What use is it? What has it got to do with economic progress? If you want to know more then Swiss Re's iPad app is for you. 
The app is aimed at newcomers to reinsurance and those who need to freshen up their knowledge of the industry. It can be used to explain the workings of the industry to new joiners, business partners, students, friends and family. 

Did you know, for example, that without the support of the Reinsurance industry many goods and services that we take for granted would simply not be available? This app covers all the basics of the business. Touching on the reinsurance business model, emerging risks, risk management and other topics, the app uses audio, graphics, videos and animations to bring the story of reinsurance alive. 

Get to know reinsurance a little better!

More info
http://www.swissre.com/publications/Swiss_Re_Apps.html

Available now on iTunes
http://itunes.apple.com/us/app/apple-store/id488666460

title: Finextra Interview - "Shifting Sands: Banking in the Digital Era"; the 8th annual IT spend survey
description:
Finextra interview Chief Marketing Officer & Chief Strategy Officer Ben Robinson on the key findings in the 8th annual IT survey.

The full report and findings can be accessed here:
http://tem.mn/21jQEPl

Over 200 senior bankers responded to a comprehensive banking survey, covering areas such as banks’ corporate and IT priorities, their challenges, and their view of the competitive environment. Because the questions posed are largely consistent from one year to the next, our survey tracks how trends and attitudes have changed over time. Moreover, because the respondent sample is highly diverse, both in terms of types of banks and geographical location, the results give a broad view of banking sentiment.  

The results are presented in association with Capgemini, the management consulting, technology services and outsourcing company.

title: Infrared Welding IR 63 - GF Piping Systems
description:
Infrared Welding (IR) 

In infrared (IR) fusion jointing the fusion areas of the components (pipes, fittings, valves) are heated to fusion temperature without contact to the heating element and jointed by means of mechanical pressure without using additional materials. 

GF Piping Systems offers a wide range of fusion machines -- also for the mobile use and the workshop use. 

IR fusion jointing requires adequate technical know-how, which can be acquired in the appropriate training courses. Your GF Piping Systems representative will gladly provide you with information about training possibilities.

title: Kugelhahn Typ 543 - GF Piping Systems - Deutsch
description:
Kugelhahn Typ 543 

Mit dem Drei-Weg-Kugelhahn Typ 543 bietet Ihnen GF Piping Systems eine durchgängige Modellreihe mit einem breiten Zubehörprogramm für sämtliche Varianten - von der Handarmatur bis hin zur Automatikversion.

Der Kugelhahn ist die perfekte Armatur für anspruchsvolle Misch- und Verteilungsprozesse. Er erscheint im Design des Kugelhahns Typ 546 und ist in den Dimensionen DN10 bis DN50 verfügbar.

Horizontal oder vertikal: der perfekte Kugelhahn

Der Drei-Weg Kugelhahn Typ 543 bietet Qualität, Flexibilität und Sicherheit. Dies gilt sowohl für die horizontale als auch für die vertikale Armatur. 

Die horizontale Ausführung mit einer L- oder T-Bohrung in der Kugel ist in den Werkstoffen PVC-U, PVC-C, ABS, PP-H und PVDF verfügbar. Damit haben Sie für alle Applikationen die richtige Armatur.

Die vertikale Variante des Kugelhahns Typ 543 ist in den Werkstoffen PVC-U und ABS verfügbar. Bei dem vertikalen Modell besteht der dritte Abgang aus einem Klebestutzen nach metrischem Standard.

Als zusätzliche Version kann neben der L-Bohrung in der Kugel auch eine Drei-Bein-Kugel in den Kugelhahn eingesetzt werden.

Für weitere Informationen besuchen Sie unsere Webseite: http://www.gfps.com/appgate/ecat/common_flow/100006/COM/de/index.html

title: Corporate Movie - GF Piping Systems - 汉语
description:
GF管路系统集团 
GF管路系统集团是世界领先的高质量塑料管路系统制造商，其产品广泛用于工业，市政水气输送及民用建筑。

GF管路系统集团致力于开发、制造和销售确保安全输送各种流体的管路系统。为适应不同的应用和特定的市场需求，GF管路系统集团可提供6万种以上的产品因而实现采购一站式服务：从管材、管件到阀门和测量仪器以及各自不同的连接技术。在液体和气体的传输过程中，不论是为工业系统、民用建筑还是为市政水气输送工程，都能针对任何应用提供系统解决方案。

GF管路系统集团在24个国家拥有物流和销售网络并在80个国家设有代表处，现代化的电子商务和信息技术可确保准确迅速的发货。为了更好满足客户的需求，我们在瑞士，奥地利、德国、意大利、中国和美国均建有工厂。所有组件和系统都符合每个市场领域的应用标准并通过了权威检测部门的检测。

title: Solutions for Chemical Process Industry - GF Piping Systems - English
description:
Chemical Process Industry
Decision-makers have one goal in common: to manufacture chemical products cost-efficiently in a complex market

GF Piping Systems steps up to this challenge with a comprehensive system offering of pipes, fittings, valves and the ideal jointing technology as well as an optimally adapted selection of components for measurement and control technology. Our customer focus is on Chemical Production, Chemical Distribution, Surface Treatment and Mining. We continually set ourselves new goals on the path to perfect global customer service in a complex market.

Keeping an eye on value
GF Piping Systems sets milestones -- also in the area of added value services. Our customers benefit in multiple ways when using plastic piping systems from GF Piping Systems.

High cost-efficiency
Our innovative plastic piping systems allow our customers to operate with lower costs on the basis of the natural advantages of plastic compared to metal.

More safety
Wherever required, our double containment piping systems comply with the demanding current health and safety regulations.

Lower energy consumption
Smoother inner walls prevent incrustation in pipes and enable even throughput with a constant pump pressure.

No corrosion
Plastics don't rust like metal piping systems may.

Less downtime
Using our measurement and control components assures our customers optimal control of production processes, a reduction of operating costs and less downtime.


For more information visit our website: http://www.gfps.com/content/gfps/com/en/products_and_solutions/solutions/overview.html

title: What is driving markets – Fear or fundamentals? – UBS Investor Forum, March 2016
description:
At this month’s UBS Investor Forum (http://www.ubs.com/investorforum), investors looked at the continuing volatility in markets and debated whether this was driven by fears or a fundamental deterioration. Although some participants held bearish views, the majority felt that fears had overdone the reality and that this could create opportunities where the fundamentals did not reflect pricings.

In this monthly forum, the Chief Investment Office (CIO) invites thought leaders to debate the key topics affecting financial markets, and to challenge the UBS House View. Participants are sourced from UBS Investment Bank and Global Asset Management, as well as leading asset managers. By regularly gathering independent insights from its peers, the CIO prevents the risk of developing “tunnel vision”, or resting on its laurels. This ensures a robust, innovative, and industry-leading investment process.

title: MultiSwiss -  Dental implant
description:
Thanks to its multi-tool design, the MultiSwiss 6x14 is highly flexible. The back work operations allow for the installation of 2 back work tools. Various devices allow for additional machining capacity : polygon milling device, high-frequency drilling /deburring systems for operations and back work. In all cases, the clearance for falling chips is not obstructed during main or back work operations.
Main advantages :
Rapid barrel indexing made possible by the torque motor.
Independent speed for each position.
Thermal regulation of the entire machine.
Sliding headstock spindles with hydrostatic bushings.
14 linear axes, 7 C axes.
"Plug & Play" system for attachments
 "One piece machine" design, with barfeeder, oil tank and filtration.
Reduced floor space.
Collet adjustment from the front.

title: EvoDECO 16 - Monoaxial Screw
description: Monoaxial screw machined on a Tornos Swiss Type Lathe EvoDECO 16a. The two powerful spindles with synchronous motors allows EvoDECO to cut drastically cycle time. With 4 fully independant tool system ans up to 10 axes and 2 C axis EvoDECO is a perfect fit for any part from simple one till very complex one. EvoDECO 16a is a major technological evolution of the DECO platform.

title: SAS 16.6 - Plug
description:
SAS-16.6

Automatic, cam-operated multispindle lathes 
and programmable 6-spindle controller 
Capacity: 4-16 (17) mm

Tornos designed the SAS-16.6 in order to meet market requirements for precision - namely to produce 100% of parts within reduced tolerances. This objective was achieved by way of Hirth toothed gears, which provide exceptional strength and by new spindle bearings. 
This lathe benefits from almost 40 years' of experience with multispindles derived from the AS-14 and SAS-16 DC machines. By way of its new design, the SAS-16.6 provides even greater precision with the parts produced. 

The Fanuc control makes the lathe even more user-friendly, thereby offering a large range of use. 

The slide moving along the central shaft, the cross-slides, independent feeds, counter-spindles - all these strategic units are controlled by a single camshaft located in the upper central section of the machine. 

Flat cams for the slides and bell cams for the slide rail, independent feeds, counter-spindles... all these parts are readily accessible. 

This lathe was conceived for high production rates.

title: Behind the Biennale: “They Come to Us without a Word”
description: Since the 1970s, pioneering video and performance artist Joan Jonas has called Cape Breton, Nova Scotia, her second home. There, far away from downtown New York, where she settled in the 1960s, Jonas draws inspiration from the arcadian landscape and local ghost stories. In “They Come to Us without a Word,” Jonas fills the Venice Biennale’s United States Pavilion with an immersive installation that explores the transportive, albeit ephemeral, qualities of nature and myth. “The most important thing I’m dealing with right now is the fragility of nature,” says Jonas. “Things are disappearing, and so ghosts also relate to memories of creatures that are becoming extinct, so those ghosts are here too.” In the pavilion installation, swirling projections, glowing video monitors, spinning mobiles, and uncanny assortments of objects come together in an otherworldly environment that suggests exploration into uncharted lands, the existence of ghostly apparitions, and the sublime effects of nature. To some, the environment might resolve as a dreamland; to others, an eerie post-apocalyptic after-life. To Jonas, her work is whatever you want it to be: “I don’t want to explain it, I don’t have to describe it, it’s what people bring to it – just experience it.”

title: Behind the Biennale: “to be all ways to be”
description: The 83-year-old Dutch artist herman de vries leads us to Lazzaretto Vecchio, an abandoned island in the Venetian lagoon, where he has installed a nearly hidden installation called natura mater. As de vries sits in the overgrown landscape, his sunhat shading his face but without diminishing his signature white beard, he recites a poem that reads something like a summation of his long life and pioneering conceptual oeuvre: “I see, I smell, I taste, I hear, I feel, I think, I eat, I drink, I breathe, I piss, I shit, I love, so, I am.” Educated as a biologist, and actively involved in the Zero movement of the 1960s, de vries’s body of work has since quietly traversed – and seamlessly converged – the fields of art, science, and philosophy. For natura mater, and its complementary exhibition in the Venice Biennale’s Dutch Pavilion, entitled “to be all ways to be,” de vries has gathered and rearranged natural and manmade objects as a reminder of life’s fundamentals: “You walk over the earth, and you don’t realize that you have colors under your feet,” the artist says.
tags: to be all ways to be

title: Behind the Biennale: Camille Norment’s Haunting Symphony Shatters the Nordic Pavilion
description: Standing in front of the shattered windows of the Nordic Pavilion, Camille Norment sheds light on her minimalist, multi-sensory installation, entitled “Rapture.” Here, the artist explores the sonic possibilities of glass and, in tandem, the euphoric and traumatic effects of sound on mind and body. Piped through large microphones that seem to grow from the ceiling like tree branches, a haunting round of 12 female voices—each moving back and forth between two notes—vibrates through the space. Large-scale panes of broken glass are strewn along the edges of the Sverre Fehn-designed building, suggesting the extreme power of sound and its ability to break through barriers of all kinds. A hypnotizing performance by the Camille Norment Trio activates the installation – Norment plays the glass harmonica (an instrument played by Mozart and Marie Antoinette and later banned for its capacity to arouse ecstasy), Håvard Skaset strums the electric guitar, and Vegar Vårdal spins through space like a whirling dervish while playing the violin. “This piece is not about things being destroyed or being torn apart,” says Norment, “but it’s about something being shaken up – just like getting goose bumps when you’re happy … or when you’re frightened.”

title: Behind the Biennale: “Personne et les autres”
description: For this year’s Belgian Pavilion, artist Vincent Meessen passed up the opportunity to present a solo exhibition and, instead, invited an international cohort of creators to show with him. “Personne et les autres” explores contemporary global exchange and creative collaboration within the context of Belgium’s colonial history. Artists from Belgium, Brazil, Democratic Republic of Congo, France, French Guyana, Italy, Pakistan, the United States, and Zimbabwe come together as a global network of voices – an approach that undermines the traditional structure of the Biennale’s Olympics-style national pavilion model. Here, Meessen and Congolese artist Sammy Baloji discuss the progressive artistic and sociopolitical potential of collaboration. “This idea of collaboration is a strong thing – it’s a need to share an experience, a space, a culture,” says Baloji. “To talk about our reality, and also to dream.”

title: Swiss ST 26 - Demo Part
description:
o address the need for a mid-range machine capable of competitively producing relatively complex parts, Tornos has created the Swiss ST 26. Everything suggests that this machine, with its seven linear axes, two C axes, high machining capacity and extremely competitive price, will be up to the task.

The Swiss ST 26 can be equipped with up to 36 tools, including 20 driven tools. The modular concept enables optimal distribution of rotating tools on the machine's tool systems. The Swiss ST 26 is available with a complete range of devices, including a polygon tool, radial and frontal drilling/milling devices, inclined drilling/milling device, thread whirling tool, HF spindle, etc. It is also possible to equip the machine with a variety of peripheral devices, such as high pressure pumps, oil mist extractor, coolant temperature stabiliser, etc. the machine is available in 3 packs with different equipment:

Starter
Advanced
Medical
For more information please visit : www.swiss-st.com

title: Tornos - We keep you turning
description:
Headquartered in the Jura region of Switzerland, Tornos, a manufacturer of automatic turning machines, is a pioneer of sliding headstock technology. Since 1880, this region has developed as a provider of high-precision automatic turning machines to the world. Tornos primarily manufactures CNC sliding headstock automatic turning machines, cam- or numerically-controlled multi-spindle machines an machining centers for complex workpieces requiring high-precision machining (Almac). Because the high-precision turning sector is subject to stringent standards governing quality, precision and productivity, it is little surprise that these Swiss strengths come from the same part of the world.

Discover more about Tornos history on: www.tornos.com

Am I a good father? David Coulthard explores one of Life's Questions
description:
David Coulthard took part in his final Formula 1 race as a driver just weeks before the birth of his son, Dayton. But instead of retiring from motorsport altogether, DC put his career on a new course and now combines fatherhood with his duties as a broadcaster, newspaper columnist and entrepreneur.

In our short film, he asks himself one of life’s biggest questions, ‘Am I a good father?’ and explains how he tries to find a balance that’s right for him and his loved ones.

title: MultiSwiss - Gear worm
description:
The MultiSwiss is the link between multi-spindle and single-spindle machines. The MultiSwiss has 6 mobile spindles which use torque motor technology to index the barrel. It is very fast and can deliver cycle times equal to those of cam-operated multi-spindle turning machines.

Thanks to its hydrostatic technology, the MultiSwiss can achieve exceptional finishes (Ra 0.15) and outstanding tool adherence even in materials considered difficult to machine. Despite its exceptional performance, the MultiSwiss is extremely easy to set up and adjust, and it is programmed in the same way as 6 machines with 3 linear axes, which means you don't need to be an expert in multi-spindle machines to operate it.
More informations
http://www.tornos.com/en/content/multiswiss-6x14

description: SISTEM51 is 100 percent Swiss made and features an exceptional 90 hour power reserve. Hermetically sealed within its case, the 3 Hz movement delivers precise, long-lasting, maintenance-free performance. http://www.swatch.com/en/collections/sistem51

title: Isofast Seam Attachment
description: SFS intec offers the isofast® system, a innovative and highly productive fastening system for low slope roofs.    The isofast® system uses belted fasteners and plates for insulation and membrane attachment.  It is a 1-person, 1-step, plate and fastener installation process that results in reduced labor and time on job.  isofast® is 3x faster, and therefore saves contractors money!

title: SwissNano - Test pin
description: The SwissNano was designed to meet the demand for small workpieces requiring very high precision. For example, its kinematics enable the machine to produce two thirds of watch movement components, from the simple to the most complex,including cutting ,with excellent finishes. Its capability extends beyond horological applications to include any type of workpiece requiring extreme quality and precision. The kinematic structure was designed for exemplary balance and thermal management enables the operating temperature to be achieved very rapidly.

title: Almac BA 1008 - index
description:
The ultra-compact bar miller born in watchmaking territory

The BA 1008 is fed with bars via the machine, using a divider system which allows workpieces up to a diameter of 16 mm to be loaded. Positioned machining operations and interpolation between the tool systems and the workpiece are easily possible. With 4 frontal spindles, 3 lateral spindles and 2 secondary operation spindles, the BA 1008 is well equipped to service Almac's trademark industry: watchmaking.

title: Jeremy Scott for Swatch | Swatch & Fashion Collection
description:
Kansas City-born designer Jeremy Scott takes fashion very seriously -- but he is keen to point out that taking something seriously does not mean it has to be all that serious. Jeremy sees fashion as an opportunity for self-expression and social commentary, and injects his signature sense of humour and references to pop culture into every collection. His runway career began in Paris, after starting out in New York. Since then, he has flooded the world with his signature stylings, which include metallic, winged trainers, pizza slice and burger designs, and one-legged trousers.

Yet Jeremy's work is not about novelty; it's about being fearless. Jeremy's SS12 collection, pays homage to his country upbringing, through an ever-present pop lens. Taking leave from his subculture-inspired AW11 collection, this season Jeremy celebrates thigh slapping homegrown Americana -- meaning that fringing, torn denim, patent leather chaps and cartoon cowboy and graphic prints have all stormed the catwalk. Jeremy has rivalled his independent success through collaborations with established labels, and for Swatch, he has transformed the brand's now classic design, fusing the distinctive Swatch style with his own. For Jeremy, transformation comes naturally. In what is his second range of designs for Swatch he has built on the success of the first collection, with the wraparound 'punk' style bearing a close resemblance to his current catwalk show.

The other examples, seen in this shoot, bring to the fore Jeremy's fascination with, and exploration of, American history and mass culture. A favourite with performers for his attention-grabbing creations -- perhaps most famously for the Muppet diva, Miss Piggy -- Jeremy's work is frequently found shimmying across stages and red carpets. Lady Gaga, MIA, Nicki Minaj and Kanye West -- all artists as famous for their style as for their music -- have sought out Scott for his innovative, uninhibited ideas. His latest collection for Swatch gives everyone the chance to own a timeless piece of Jeremy Scott design.

www.hungertv.com

Curated by Francesco Bonami, the exhibition examines the artistic production on paper through 50 works by 33 acclaimed international artists working from the 1960s to today, including Frank Auerbach, Charles Avery, Georg Baselitz, Troy Brauntuch, Chuck Close, John Currin, Lucian Freud, Robert Gober, Jenny Holzer, Martin Kippenberger, Roy Lichtenstein, Robert Longo, Sigmar Polke, Ed Ruscha, Jim Shaw, Cy Twombly and Robin Winters.

title: Vaudoise Versicherungen - TV Spot - Lausanne 2013
description:
http://www.vaudoise.ch - Mehr als eine Kampagne -- eine Lebensphilosophie 

Seit der Gründung im Jahr 1895 hat die Vaudoise ihre Unabhängigkeit und genossenschaftliche Ausrichtung verteidigt, um ihren Kunden und deren Bedürfnissen nahe zu sein. Mit 90 Verkaufsstellen in der ganzen Schweiz möchte die Vaudoise, auf die speziellen Bedürfnisse jedes Einzelnen eingehen und zugleich der Partner für Gelassenheit für alle Schweizer sein. Die Kommunikationskampagne der Vaudoise verweist bei der Erreichung dieses Ziels auf eine wesentliche Qualität, die sie mit ihren Kunden teilt: Dynamik.
 
Der Kunde zuerst
 
Statt auf das eigene Unternehmen lenkt die Vaudoise mit der neuen Kampagne den Blick und den Diskurs auf jene, die ihr ihr Vertrauen schenken. Sie anerkennt ihre Leidenschaften, persönlichen Entscheidungen, besonderen Schicksale und einmaligen Lebenswege. Jenseits der gewohnten Klischees macht sich die Kampagne zum Fürsprecher einer innovativen, leidenschaftlichen Schweiz, zu der sich ein jeder stolz bekennen kann.
 
Diese Kampagne widerspiegelt die neuen Werte der Vaudoise Versicherungen und unsere Philosophie, das Vertrauen stets ins Zentrum unseres Handelns stellt.

title: Vaudoise on Tour - Tour de Suisse 2014 - Miss Amitié
description: http://www.vaudoiseontour.ch/de - Sina ist die neue Miss Amitié auf Vaudoise On Tour und Tour de Suisse 2014

title: Vaudoise Assurances - TV Spot - Bougy-Villars 2013
description:
http://www.vaudoise.ch - Plus qu'une campagne, un art de vivre
 
Depuis sa création en 1895, la Vaudoise n'a eu de cesse de défendre son indépendance, sa personnalité mutualiste afin de rester proche de ses clients, de leurs attentes. Avec 90 points de vente sur l'ensemble du territoire, elle veut répondre aux attentes de chacun, selon leur besoins spécifiques, mais avec une seule ambition: être LE partenaire sérénité de tous les Suisses. Pour atteindre cet objectif, la démarche même de la Vaudoise met en avant une qualité qu'elle partage avec ses clients: le dynamisme.
 
Les clients d'abord
 
Plutôt que de centrer son discours sur l'entreprise, la Vaudoise met l'accent, avec cette campagne, sur ceux qui lui font confiance. Elle valorise les passions, les choix personnels, les destins particuliers, les parcours de vie uniques. Une campagne qui, au-delà des clichés habituels, nous offre le reflet d'une Suisse résolument innovante et enthousiaste, une Suisse à laquelle chacun peut se sentir fier d'appartenir.
 
Cette campagne reflète les nouvelles valeurs de la Vaudoise Assurances et notre philosophie, celle d'une assurance qui place la confiance au cœur de son métier.

title: Vaudoise Assurances - TV Spot - Mutualité 2014
description:
http://bit.ly/Mutualite - Plus qu'une campagne, un art de vivre

Fondée en 1895, la Vaudoise a évolué avec son temps, professionnalisé ses activités et modifié ses structures, tout en restant fidèle aux valeurs mutualistes de sa société mère, la Mutuelle Vaudoise: solidité, responsabilité, présence et engagement.

En 2012, après plusieurs années d’excellents résultats et de renforcement des fonds propres du Groupe, le conseil d’administration et la direction ont souhaité réactiver la redistribution des bénéfices aux clients Vaudoise Générale.

Les titulaires de polices d'assurances Vie bénéficient déjà d’une participation contractuelle aux excédents, il s’agit donc, pour le Groupe, de compléter le dispositif existant à l’attention des clients fidèles de Vaudoise Générale. Ceux-ci se verront redistribuer, selon un cycle biennal pour chaque branche, une partie du bénéfice de Vaudoise Générale sous forme d’une rétrocession de prime. La durée des contrats auprès de la Vaudoise constituera l’unique critère, sans prise en compte du taux de sinistres.

Pour les primes touchant des contrats dès le 1er juillet 2014, nous ferons à nouveau participer nos clients à nos excellents résultats en les faisant bénéficier d'une rétrocession de prime sous forme d'une réduction* équivalent à 10% du total de la prime payée en 2013. Seront incluses dans ce rabais toutes les polices de Véhicules à moteur, y compris les polices bateaux pour les particuliers et les entreprises.

Par cette décision, la Vaudoise souhaite remercier ses clients pour leur fidélité et les faire contribuer aux bons résultats de la compagnie.

title: Apple: Wird die Luft langsam dünner? 22.07.2015
description: Apple-Zahlen haben an der Börse meist Event-Charakter, der Markt wartet gespannt auf die News aus Cupertino. Die jüngsten Daten haben allerdings für Enttäuschung gesorgt. Warum reichen selbst gute Zahlen bei Apple manchmal nicht aus? Dies und was im Zusammenhang mit der Apple-Aktie für Anleger interessant sein könnte und wie Anleger sich entsprechend Ihrer Marktmeinung positionieren könnten, erfahren Sie im vollständigen Interview mit Heiko Geiger.

title: Visa – Mobile Payment als Chance für Visa? 17.06.2015
description:
Durch den Rückkauf seiner früheren Tochter Visa Europe versucht sich das US-Kreditkartenunternehmen Visa in Zukunft breiter am Markt zu positionieren. 2007 hatte sich der Visa-Konzern vor seinem Börsengang von seiner europäischen Sparte getrennt. Visa Europe befindet sich im Besitz von mehr als 3000 europäischen Banken. Diese könnten aufgrund vertraglicher Regelungen unter bestimmten Bedingungen zu einem Verkauf an das US-amerikanische Unternehmen gezwungen werden. Der Kauf könnte bis zu 20 Mrd USD kosten. Diese Zahl wurde vergangene Woche von der Nachrichtenagentur Bloomberg am Freitag unter Berufung auf Insiderberichte erstmals in Umlauf gebracht. Die Börsen reagierten positiv auf die mögliche Übernahme. 
Wie Sie als Investor an der Entwicklung von Visa partizipieren könnten, erfahren Sie in diesem Video mit Heiko Geiger.

title: Vaudoise Versicherungen - TV Spot - Genossenschaft 2014
description:
http://bit.ly/Mutualitaet - Mehr als eine Kampagne -- eine Lebensphilosophie 

Die Vaudoise wurde 1895 gegründet und hat sich seither stetig weiterentwickelt, ihre Tätigkeiten professionalisiert und ihre Strukturen angepasst. Gleichzeitig ist sie den genossenschaftlichen Werten ihrer Muttergesellschaft Mutuelle Vaudoise – Solidität, Verantwortung, Präsenz und Engagement – treu geblieben.

Nachdem die Vaudoise-Gruppe während mehreren Jahren hervorragende Geschäftsergebnisse erzielt und ihre Eigenmittel kontinuierlich verstärkt hat, haben der Verwaltungsrat und die Direktion 2012 beschlossen, die Kunden der Vaudoise Allgemeinen am Geschäftsgewinn zu beteiligen.

Die Inhaber einer Lebensversicherung haben bereits ein vertragliches Anrecht auf eine Überschussbeteiligung. Die Vaudoise-Gruppe wollte einen ähnlichen Vorteil auch den Kunden der Vaudoise Allgemeinen gewähren. Diese werden nun in einem Zweijahresrhythmus für jede Versicherungsbranche in Form einer Prämienrückerstattung am Gewinn der Vaudoise Allgemeinen beteiligt. Einziges Kriterium für die Gewährung der Prämienrückerstattung ist der Zeitpunkt, zu dem der Versicherungsvertrag in Kraft getreten ist. Die Zahl der Schadenfälle wird nicht berücksichtigt.

Unsere Kunden werden erneut an unseren ausgezeichneten Ergebnissen beteiligt und zwar für die Prämien, die Verträge ab dem 1. Juli 2014 betreffen. Sie kommen in den Genuss einer Prämienrückerstattung*, die 10% des Gesamtbetrags der 2013 bezahlten Prämie entspricht. Der Rabatt gilt für alle Motorfahrzeugversicherungen, inklusive Wasserfahrzeugpolicen für Privatpersonen und Unternehmen.

Mit diesem Vorgehen möchte sich die Vaudoise bei ihren Kunden für ihre Treue bedanken und sie an den guten Ergebnissen der Gesellschaft beteiligen.

«Vaudoise sein» heisst, am Gewinn seines Versicherers teilhaben!

title: Vaudoise Assurances - TV Spot - Genève 2013
description:
http://www.vaudoise.ch - Plus qu'une campagne, un art de vivre
 
Depuis sa création en 1895, la Vaudoise n'a eu de cesse de défendre son indépendance, sa personnalité mutualiste afin de rester proche de ses clients, de leurs attentes. Avec 90 points de vente sur l'ensemble du territoire, elle veut répondre aux attentes de chacun, selon leur besoins spécifiques, mais avec une seule ambition: être LE partenaire sérénité de tous les Suisses. Pour atteindre cet objectif, la démarche même de la Vaudoise met en avant une qualité qu'elle partage avec ses clients: le dynamisme.
 
Les clients d'abord
 
Plutôt que de centrer son discours sur l'entreprise, la Vaudoise met l'accent, avec cette campagne, sur ceux qui lui font confiance. Elle valorise les passions, les choix personnels, les destins particuliers, les parcours de vie uniques. Une campagne qui, au-delà des clichés habituels, nous offre le reflet d'une Suisse résolument innovante et enthousiaste, une Suisse à laquelle chacun peut se sentir fier d'appartenir.
 
Cette campagne reflète les nouvelles valeurs de la Vaudoise Assurances et notre philosophie, celle d'une assurance qui place la confiance au cœur de son métier.

description:
http://www.vaudoise.ch - Mehr als eine Kampagne -- eine Lebensphilosophie 

Seit der Gründung im Jahr 1895 hat die Vaudoise ihre Unabhängigkeit und genossenschaftliche Ausrichtung verteidigt, um ihren Kunden und deren Bedürfnissen nahe zu sein. Mit 90 Verkaufsstellen in der ganzen Schweiz möchte die Vaudoise, auf die speziellen Bedürfnisse jedes Einzelnen eingehen und zugleich der Partner für Gelassenheit für alle Schweizer sein. Die Kommunikationskampagne der Vaudoise verweist bei der Erreichung dieses Ziels auf eine wesentliche Qualität, die sie mit ihren Kunden teilt: Dynamik.
 
Der Kunde zuerst
 
Statt auf das eigene Unternehmen lenkt die Vaudoise mit der neuen Kampagne den Blick und den Diskurs auf jene, die ihr ihr Vertrauen schenken. Sie anerkennt ihre Leidenschaften, persönlichen Entscheidungen, besonderen Schicksale und einmaligen Lebenswege. Jenseits der gewohnten Klischees macht sich die Kampagne zum Fürsprecher einer innovativen, leidenschaftlichen Schweiz, zu der sich ein jeder stolz bekennen kann.
 
Diese Kampagne widerspiegelt die neuen Werte der Vaudoise Versicherungen und unsere Philosophie, das Vertrauen stets ins Zentrum unseres Handelns stellt.

title: Vaudoise Assicurazioni - TV Spot - Mutualità 2014
description:
http://bit.ly/Mutualita - Più che una campagna, uno stile di vita.

Fondata nel 1895, la Vaudoise è stata al passo con i tempi, ha professionalizzato le sue attività e modificato le sue strutture senza mai venire meno ai valori mutualisti della società madre, la Mutuelle Vaudoise: solidità, responsabilità, presenza e impegno.

Nel 2012, dopo diversi anni di eccellenti risultati e di potenziamento dei fondi propri del Gruppo, il Consiglio d’amministrazione e la Direzione hanno deciso di riattivare la ridistribuzione degli utili ai clienti della Vaudoise Generale.

I titolari di polizze d’assicurazione Vita beneficiano già di una partecipazione contrattuale alle eccedenze. Per il Gruppo, si trattava dunque di completare il sistema esistente con i clienti fedeli della Vaudoise Generale che, a un ritmo biennale per ogni branca, riceveranno una parte dell’utile sotto forma di riduzione del premio.

L’unico criterio considerato sarà la durata dei contratti presso la Vaudoise. Il tasso di sinistri non avrà di conseguenza alcun influsso.

Per i premi riguardanti contratti dal 1° luglio 2014, i nostri clienti parteciperanno di nuovo agli eccellenti risultati del Gruppo beneficiando di una riduzione* del premio pari al 10% del totale pagato nel 2013. Lo sconto concerne tutte le polizze Veicoli a motore, comprese le polizze Natanti per i privati e le imprese.

In questo modo, la Vaudoise desidera ringraziare i suoi clienti per la fedeltà e farli partecipare ai buoni risultati della Compagnia.

title: Control soybean weeds this fall
description: ROCKPORT, Ind. - With glyphosate-resistant marestail in soybeans a real issue, now is the time to get ahead with your weed control. Watch as Wayne Reid, Syngenta agronomic service representative, discusses the impact a fall herbicide application can have in the fight against marestail and other tough weeds. Learn more at http://www.KnowMoreGrowMore.com.

title: Determining Fungicide Application Timing in Soybeans
description: HAZLETON, Ind.- Scout your soybeans to determine your fungicide application timing. Agronomic service representative, Wayne Reid shows what to look for to know that the time is right.

title: Traits, Insecticides to Protect Against Corn Rootworm in Ohio
description: ROCKFORD, OH - Working with less than ideal soil types in western Ohio, it's important to establish a good root system in your corn crop. Eric Anderson shows how the right traits and the addition of a soil-applied insecticide can help. Learn more at http://www.KnowMoreGrowMore.com.

title: Grow More Soybeans
description: The grow more soybeans approach outlines the Syngenta strategy for helping growers achieve higher soybean yields through three easy steps: start strong, grow strong and yield strong. The following video dispels the myth of a soybean yield ceiling and emphasizes the proper agronomic practices recommended to attain greater bushels per acre. Syngenta offers growers a diverse product portfolio that boosts pest protection and improves soybean productivity. By understanding the agronomic practices that are encompassed by the grow more soybeans approach,  and choosing high quality Syngenta products, growers can help their soybeans start strong, grow strong and yield strong so they can grow more soybeans.

title: Keep Watch for Late-Season Pests in Corn
description: ROANOKE, Ind. - After a mid-July heat wave, conditions for grain fill have been great. Be mindful of late-season pests like corn leaf blight and gray leaf spot that may weaken stalks.

The announcement was made at the U.S. Department of State in Washington, D.C. with U.S. secretary of State John Kerry and Ambassador Kenneth M. Quinn, president of the World Food Prize. title: Resistance Fighter Mgmt Minute w/ Steve Muhlenbruch
description:
Steve Muhlenbruch, 2010 Northern Resistance Fighter of the Year, says the wet weather in Iowa is finally starting to clear out. While corn is coming in fairly strong, there is still tremendous weed pressure. The fields that did receive a pre-emergence treatment are holding up, but those that didn't have lambsquarters, some almost a foot tall. The wet weather is also making the environment favorable for diseases, especially in soybean. For Steve's full update, tune into this week's Resistance Fighter Management Minute.

Do you know a Resistance Fighter? Nominate him for the 2013 Resistance Fighter of the Year award, and you may be eligible to win an electronic tablet! Nominations are being accepted through Sept. 13, 2013 at www.ResistanceFighteroftheYear.com.

title: New technologies open up investment opportunities
description:
New technologies have become a decisive factor determining the pace of social and economic change. Technological advances -- such as digital photography or the development of Internet search engines and the smartphone -- have set new standards.

In the past, innovative companies that create new products have often rewarded investors with high share yields. For example, the stock of technology firms such as Google or Apple has soared in value since their IPOs. The technology sector still offers attractive investment opportunities today.

Find out more on: http://www.vontobel.com/technology

title: Facebook: Wie viel Potenzial hat die Aktie ? 05.02.2014
description:
Kaum zu glauben, dass Facebook schon seinen 10. Geburtstag feiert. Viele Nutzer können sich ein Leben ohne das soziale Netzwerk inzwischen kaum noch vorstellen. Und Börsianer? Die Aktie sei inzwischen schon ziemlich gut gelaufen, so Heiko Geiger, Zertifikate Experte von Vontobel. Weshalb junge Nutzer zum Teil abwandern, welchen Herausforderungen Facebook sich sonst noch stellen muss und wie Anleger sich entsprechend Ihrer Marktmeinung positionieren könnten, erfahren Sie im vollständigen Interview mit Heiko von Vontobel.

Mehr Informationen zu Vontobel und zu aktuellen Produkten, inkl. den maßgeblichen Wertpapierprospekten: http://www.vontobel-zertifikate.de

title: Facebook - Daumen hoch in 2014? 08.01.2014
description:
Hohe Erwartungen waren an den Börsengang von Facebook im Jahr 2012 und die weitere Unternehmensentwicklung geknüpft. Die Folge: Die Aktie enttäuschte nach der Erstnotiz und auch das Geschäftsmodel wurde skeptisch beäugt. Doch 2013 konnte das Unternehmen gleich zweimal punkten. Könnte für Facebook nun gelten: Daumen hoch in 2014?

Was im Zusammenhang mit der Facebook-Aktie für Anleger interessant sein könnte und wie Anleger sich entsprechend Ihrer Marktmeinung positionieren könnten, erfahren Sie im vollständigen Interview mit Heiko Geiger von Vontobel.

title: Vontobel deritrade®
description: We all know from our own experience how difficult it can be to explain a complicated issue simply and in a way that ensures a lasting understanding. With its scribble video outlining how deritrade® works, Vontobel is launching a new tool for the B2B/4C channel. This will enable the B2B target group to explain to people who might be interested in Vontobel deritrade® how it works and the 360° value chain it offers. All in just a few minutes. We can thus present a complex issue in an unusual and readily understandable manner that will appeal to young and old alike, so to speak.
